title: Pasta Chicken Salad(268 Calories Per Serving)
ingredients: 1 c. (8 oz. bottle) reduced calorie creamy Italian salad dressing
directions: Cook large shells according to package directions.
Drain and cool (rinse with cold water to cool quickly, then drain well). Combine cooled large shells with remaining ingredients and toss lightly.
Chill.
Makes 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A light and refreshing Italian-American pasta salad with tender chicken, crisp vegetables, and a tangy Italian dressing. Perfect for picnics or quick lunches, balancing creamy and crunchy textures.

title: Pepperoni Spaghetti
ingredients: 1 (32 oz.) jar spaghetti sauce with mushrooms
directions: Combine onion, green pepper, ground beef and pepperoni in a large skillet.
Cook over medium heat until beef browns, stirring to crumble.
Add spaghetti sauce and bring to a boil.
Cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American spaghetti dish with spicy pepperoni, savoury ground beef, and melted cheeses. Rich, meaty, and satisfying, ideal for a comforting family dinner.

title: Zucchini Pizzas
ingredients: 1/2 c. (2 oz.) shredded part-skim Mozzarella cheese
directions: Combine spaghetti sauce, onions, black pepper and oregano in a small bowl.
Combine Mozzarella cheese and Parmesan cheese.
Place zucchini coins on a cookie sheet which has been coated with vegetable cooking spray (approximately 1-inch apart).
Top with sauce, then a mushroom slice.
Sprinkle with cheese mixture. Broil until hot and bubbly.

_enrichment.description: A creative Italian twist on pizza using zucchini slices as the base, topped with tangy spaghetti sauce, melted cheese, and mushrooms. Light yet flavourful, perfect for a quick and healthy meal.

title: Sour Cream Lasagna
directions: Cook noodles according to package directions; rinse and drain. Brown hamburger in skillet.
Add next 6 ingredients; mix well. Cook for 5 minutes; remove from heat.
Combine noodles with cottage cheese, sour cream and green onions.
Alternate layers of noodle mixture and meat mixture in 2-quart baking dish, ending with meat mixture.
Top with Cheddar cheese.
Bake at 350° for 30 minutes, or until heated through.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, cheesy American lasagna with layers of egg dumpling noodles, savoury beef, and a blend of cottage cheese, sour cream, and cheddar. A comforting classic for family gatherings.

title: Spaghetti Meat Sauce
directions: Brown ground beef in small Dutch oven, stirring until it crumbles; drain well.
Stir in tomato sauce, water, dried onion flakes, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder and pepper.
Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Cover, reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add spaghetti sauce and simmer uncovered 20 minutes.
Cook spaghetti as package directs and drain.
Spoon meat sauce over cooked spaghetti.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Yields 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian-American spaghetti dish with a rich, meaty sauce infused with Worcestershire and garlic. Simple yet deeply flavourful, perfect for a satisfying weeknight meal.

title: String Pie
directions: Cook beef, onion and green pepper in large skillet over medium-high heat until meat is brown, stirring to separate meat; drain fat.
Stir in spaghetti sauce, mix well.
Combine Parmesan cheese, eggs and butter in large bowl; mix well.
Place in bottom of 13 x 9-inch pan; spread cottage cheese over top.
Pour sauce mixture over cottage cheese.
Sprinkle Mozzarella over top.
Bake in preheated 350° oven until cheese melts, about 20 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American casserole blending rich ground beef, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella, all layered with tangy spaghetti sauce. Perfect for a comforting family meal with bold, savoury flavours.

title: Spaghetti Pie
ingredients: 2 eggs, well beaten or equivalent egg substitute
directions: Cook spaghetti (about 3 cups).
Stir olive oil into hot spaghetti.
Stir in Parmesan cheese and eggs.
Form spaghetti mixture into a "crust" in a 10-inch pie plate sprayed with Pam. Spread cottage cheese over bottom of spaghetti crust.

_enrichment.description: A lighter twist on the classic Italian pie, featuring al dente spaghetti bound with eggs and Parmesan, topped with cottage cheese and savoury beef sauce. A delightful balance of textures and flavours for a satisfying meal.

title: Seafood And Pasta Salad
ingredients: 1 bag tri-colored rotini noodles, cooked and drained
directions: Boil the noodles, then rinse and put in a bowl which you will be using for serving the salad.
Saute scallops in the olive oil. Add the scallops along with the rest of the seafood to the noodles.
Dice the green onions (exclude the chive part) and boiled eggs.
Add to the salad.
Add mayonnaise; use more or less for taste.
Mix ingredients together.
Ready to serve!

_enrichment.description: A refreshing Mediterranean-inspired salad with tender scallops, succulent shrimp, and imitation crab, tossed in a creamy mayonnaise dressing. Light yet satisfying, perfect for warm days or picnics.

title: Italian Pasta Salad
directions: Cook macaroni as directed on package; drain and let cool.
Mix all other ingredients with macaroni.
You may need more or less Italian dressing according to taste.
Keep in refrigerator. Sprinkle with Parmesan when served.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian-American pasta salad brimming with al dente macaroni, crunchy vegetables, and a zesty Italian dressing. A crowd-pleaser for picnics, barbecues, or any casual gathering.

title: 3 Cheese Chicken Bake
directions: Cook and drain noodles.
Cook onions and peppers in margarine until tender.
Stir in soup, mushrooms, pimento, milk and basil. Layer half of noodles in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Top with 1/2 of sauce, 1/2 of cottage cheese, 1/2 of chicken and half of both cheeses. Repeat layers.
Bake at 350° for 45 minutes.
If casserole comes from "fridge" add 15 minutes to baking time.

_enrichment.description: A decadent Italian-American bake layered with lasagna noodles, creamy cottage cheese, tender chicken, and a rich cream of chicken sauce. A comforting dish that’s sure to impress at any dinner party.

title: Genoese Pesto
directions: Wash the basil leaves; make sure they are well dried.
Put basil in food processor and grind (may have to add it bit by bit). Next, add rest of the ingredients.
Process until it looks like creamed spinach (do not puree).
Serve over pasta.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Ligurian classic, Genoese Pesto bursts with fresh basil, garlic, and nutty richness, all emulsified in golden olive oil. This aromatic green sauce, traditionally tossed with trofie pasta, is a celebration of summer's bounty.

title: Tuna Pasta Salad
ingredients: 1 c. uncooked whole wheat shells or spirals (1 1/2 c. cooked)
1 (6 1/2 oz.) can light tuna (packed in water), drained and flaked
1/3 c. frozen peas, do not thaw
directions: Cook pasta in boiling water 10 to 12 minutes to taste.
Drain and rinse with cold water.
In a large bowl, combine yogurt, honey, lemon juice, vinegar, dill, celery seed, paprika and white pepper.
Stir in pasta, tuna, peas, celery and red pepper.
Mix gently, but thoroughly, until evenly coated with dressing. Sprinkle green onion on top.
Serve at room temperature.
If salad needs to be held for more than 2 hours, cover and refrigerate.
If chilled, let sit at room temperature a minimum of 15 minutes before serving.
Yields 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A light and zesty Mediterranean-inspired pasta salad, blending whole wheat shells with tender tuna, crisp vegetables, and a honey-lemon dressing. Perfect for picnics or quick lunches, it balances freshness with a subtle smokiness from the paprika.

title: Chicken Kiev
directions: Place breasts between waxed paper; pound until 1/4-inch thick. In pie pan, combine the next 5 ingredients.
In bowl, mix butter, parsley and 1/2 teaspoon oregano.
Spread mixture onto breasts. Lay strip of cheese (1 1/2 x 1/2-inch) along width of breast. Roll and secure with toothpicks.
Dip in melted butter; roll in crumbs.
Place in pan lined with foil, seam side down.
Drizzle with remaining butter.
Bake, uncovered, in a 425° oven for 30 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink inside.

_enrichment.description: A decadent Ukrainian classic, Chicken Kiev features succulent chicken breasts stuffed with herbed butter and melted cheese, encased in a crispy breadcrumb crust. This indulgent dish is a showstopper for special occasions or dinner parties.

title: Italian Zucchini Casserole
directions: Spray 9 x 13 inch pan.
Place layers of tomato, onion, zucchini and cheese.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper and liberally with Italian seasoning.
Sprinkle about 1/2 cup crushed Ritz over all.
Make second layer same as first, beginning with tomato and ending with cheese, top with more seasoning and crushed Ritz. Cover with foil and bake 30 minutes at 350°.
Remove foil and bake another 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American casserole layered with zucchini, tomatoes, and melted mozzarella, finished with a buttery cracker topping. This hearty dish is ideal for family dinners or meal prep, offering a taste of home with every bite.

title: Vegetable Pizza
directions: Press rolls in 9 x 15-inch pan.
Bake at 350° for 10 minutes. Spread mixture of cream cheese, mayonnaise and Ranch dressing onto cool crust.
Press chopped vegetables and cheese onto mixture. Cut into squares.
This dish freezes well.

_enrichment.description: A quick and customizable vegetable pizza on a crescent roll base, topped with a creamy dressing blend and a medley of fresh vegetables. This easy-to-make dish is perfect for a casual weeknight meal or a fun snack with friends.

title: Crawfish Tortellini
ingredients: 1 (7 oz.) pkg. tortellini with Parmesan cheese
directions: Saute onion and garlic in butter.
Add crawfish (slightly rinsed) and continue cooking approximately 5 minutes.
Add Parmesan cheese, parsley and whipping cream.
Prepare tortellini as directed.
Fold in with sauce and season with salt and red pepper.
If sauce needs thickening, mix cornstarch with water and add to sauce.

_enrichment.description: A luxurious Italian-inspired dish blending delicate tortellini with sweet crawfish tails in a creamy, garlicky Parmesan sauce. Rich umami and savoury notes shine through, perfect for a special dinner.

title: Apple Pizza
directions: Mix first 3 ingredients together and roll out to fit a cookie sheet.
Peel and slice apples; crush cornflakes and sprinkle on pastry.
Place apples in row until sheet is filled, then make a mixture of 3/4 cup sugar and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon and sprinkle on apples.
Dot with butter.
Bake at 400° for approximately 15 minutes.
Beat egg, milk, vanilla and 2 tablespoons sugar; pour over apples.
Bake again until custard sets, approximately 5 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A comforting American classic featuring a buttery, cinnamon-spiced apple topping on a flaky pastry base, finished with a creamy custard layer. Sweet, spiced, and homey—ideal for autumn gatherings.

title: Pasta Ala Renee
directions: Prepare pasta according to directions.
Saute garlic in margarine until soft.
Add onion and bell pepper until tender; add mushrooms, tomatoes and pepper to taste.
Combine sauce and pasta. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian pasta dish packed with sautéed bell peppers, mushrooms, and red onion in a light, garlicky margarine sauce. Fresh, herbaceous, and slightly peppery—quick and satisfying for any weeknight.

title: Light And Easy Alfredo Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in container of an electric blender; process until smooth, stopping once to scrape down sides.
Pour into a small saucepan.
Cook sauce over low heat, stirring constantly, until thoroughly heated.
Yields 2 1/2 cups.
Contains 86 calories, 0.8 g fat and 0.5 g saturated fat per 3 1/2-ounce serving.

_enrichment.description: A silky, low-fat Alfredo sauce with a velvety blend of Parmesan, butter, and basil. Light yet rich, this creamy sauce elevates any pasta dish with minimal effort.

title: Microwave Spaghetti Sauce
ingredients: 1/2 c. tomato juice or tomato catsup
directions: Brown ground meat in frying pan on stove.
Add onion and garlic.
Cook until ground beef is done, then drain beef before adding other ingredients.
Cook, covered, in microwave for 20 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes.
Rest, covered, for 5 minutes. Serve over cooked spaghetti.

_enrichment.description: A quick and hearty microwave spaghetti sauce with tender ground beef, aromatic garlic, and a medley of Italian herbs. Robust, tangy, and effortless—perfect for a busy weeknight.

title: Spinach Cheese Bake
ingredients: 2 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed
1 (8 oz.) pkg. (2 c.) shredded Mozzarella cheese
directions: Drain spinach thoroughly, squeezing out liquid.
In skillet, cook sausage until brown; drain fat.
Stir in tomato sauce; set aside.
In large bowl, combine drained spinach, cottage cheese, Parmesan and egg; spread mixture in bottom of 12 x 7 1/2 x 2-inch baking dish.
Spoon sausage mixture over spinach mixture.
Top with Mozzarella; cover and chill several hours or overnight.
Before serving, sprinkle croutons over cheese.
Bake at 350° for 40 minutes.
Serves 8. Contains 344 calories, 20 gr. fat, 86 mg. cholesterol.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American bake blending creamy spinach, savoury sausage, and melted cheeses, topped with crispy herb croutons. Rich, comforting, and perfect for a family meal.

title: My Friend Joyce'S "Bathtub Casserole"
ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) jar pepperoncini salad peppers, drained and sliced
directions: Cook ground beef and next 3 ingredients in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring, until meat browns and crumbles. Drain well; set aside.
Combine chopped pepperoni and next 5 ingredients in a large bowl; stir in meat mixture and cooked pasta shells.
Spoon half of mixture into 2 lightly greased 11 x 7 x 1 1/2-inch baking dishes.
Sprinkle with half of Parmesan and Mozzarella cheeses.
Top with remaining pasta mixture.
Bake at 350° for 30 minutes or until heated; top with remaining cheeses. Bake 5 additional minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty, layered casserole from Joyce's kitchen, packed with ground meats, peppers, and three types of cheese. A crowd-pleasing dish with bold, spicy, and tangy notes.

title: Pizza Salad
directions: Dice tomatoes and onion; cube cheese.
Mix tomatoes, onion and cheese with cooled, cooked macaroni.
Add all other ingredients except Parmesan cheese and croutons.
Refrigerate 2 or more hours. When ready to serve, add croutons and Parmesan cheese.

_enrichment.description: A refreshing Italian-American salad inspired by pizza flavours, featuring macaroni, tomatoes, cheese, and tangy dressing. Light yet satisfying, ideal for warm days.

title: Baked Stuffed Shells
directions: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium heat.
Drain fat; sprinkle with garlic salt and set aside to cool.
Mix cheeses, eggs, salt, parsley flakes and pepper in a large mixing bowl.
Mix ground beef with cheese mixture.
Cook large shells according to package instructions.

_enrichment.description: Classic Italian stuffed shells filled with a rich blend of ground beef and cheeses, baked in tomato sauce. A comforting dish with tender pasta and gooey cheese.

title: Rotelle Salad(A Pasta Salad)
directions: Mix olive oil, lemon juice, garlic and parsley and set aside. Cook Rotelle as directed on package, adding broccoli during last 5 minutes of cooking.
Drain and rinse in cold water to stop cooking process.
Toss Rotelle-broccoli with olive oil dressing until well coated.
Add tomatoes, green onions and cheese and toss again. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Ripe olives can be added, if desired.
Serves 11.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian pasta salad with rotelle, broccoli, and cherry tomatoes, tossed in a zesty lemon-herb dressing. Light, fresh, and perfect for summer gatherings.

title: Cheesy Lasagne
directions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Combine in large bowl Ricotta, Parmesan, Romano and 1/2 Mozzarella cheese.
Add eggs and parsley. Soak noodles in cold water for 10 minutes.
In pan, spread 1/2 cup sauce, then place 3 noodles on top.
Spread 1/3 Ricotta filling over noodles.
Pour 1 cup sauce over cheese filling. Repeat layers, ending with sauce.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian classic layered with rich tomato sauce, creamy ricotta, and melted mozzarella, delivering a comforting blend of tangy, savoury, and umami flavours. Perfect for a cosy family dinner.

title: Pasta Salad
ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) box pasta, cooked and drained
1 large bottle zesty Italian salad dressing
directions: Cook pasta as directed.
Drain and rinse in cold water. Combine tomatoes (halved or quartered), green pepper (chopped), broccoli, cauliflower, mushrooms and parsley.
Add pasta and toss. Pour dressing over salad and add cheese.
Let marinate overnight. Serves 20.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-American pasta salad brimming with fresh vegetables, briny olives, and zesty dressing, offering a light yet satisfying crunch. Ideal for summer picnics or meal prep.

title: Alaska Canned Salmon Carbonara
ingredients: 1 (14 3/4 oz.) can Alaska salmon, drained and broken in bite-size pieces
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and keep warm.
In 3-quart saucepan, cook bacon until crisp.
Drain, reserving 2 tablespoons bacon fat.
Add onion, garlic, basil, oregano and peppers.
Cook 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes and vinegar; cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until slightly thickened. Stir in salmon and cream; heat through.
Serve over hot pasta and garnish with Parmesan.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, smoky twist on carbonara featuring canned Alaskan salmon, bacon, and a touch of red wine vinegar for brightness. A rich yet balanced dish with Italian and Pacific influences.

title: Pizza Meatballs
ingredients: 1 c. Italian style fine dry bread crumbs
4 oz. Mozzarella cheese, cut into 24 (1/2-inch) cubes
directions: Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, milk, onion, salt and pepper; mix well.
Cover each cube of cheese with about 1 tablespoon of meat mixture, carefully sealing all around.
Place meatballs in a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 20 to 25 minutes.

_enrichment.description: Juicy Italian meatballs wrapped around gooey mozzarella cubes, baked in tangy pizza sauce for a playful twist on a classic. A crowd-pleasing appetizer or main course.

title: Zucchini Squares
directions: Place all ingredients in bowl and stir.
Don't beat.
Bake in a 9 x 13-inch greased pan in a 350° oven for 45 to 50 minutes or until golden brown.
Thin slices of pepperoni may also be placed on top (if preferred).

_enrichment.description: A savoury, cheesy bake featuring tender zucchini and a fluffy buttermilk batter, topped with golden brown crust. A versatile dish that’s both light and satisfying.

title: Pizza Meat Loaf
directions: Mix everything together, except for cheese.
Put 1/3 of meat mixture in bottom of pan (pan that you normally use for a meat loaf).
Spread half of the cheese over it.
Add 1/3 more of meat mixture, rest of cheese and remaining 1/3 of meat mixture.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour (cover, if you wish).
For an interesting top, spread some catsup, more grated cheese, and some small pieces of bacon over the top during the last 20 minutes of cooking, uncovered.

_enrichment.description: A playful fusion of Italian pizza and American meat loaf, this dish brings together the comforting flavours of mozzarella, oregano, and a hint of spice from red pepper. Perfect for a hearty family meal with a twist.

title: Lasagna Sausage Pinwheels
ingredients: 1 lb. hot Italian link sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
directions: Brown sausage over low heat in a large, heavy skillet; drain sausage on paper towels, reserving 1/4 cup drippings.
Saute onion and garlic in drippings until crisp-tender.
Return sausage to skillet; stir in tomato paste, water, sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt and bay leaf.
Simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour; stir occasionally. Discard bay leaf.

_enrichment.description: A delightful twist on classic Italian lasagna, these pinwheels feature savoury sausage and creamy cheeses wrapped in lasagna noodles. Rich tomato sauce and a touch of sweetness make this dish a crowd-pleaser.

title: Sausage-Spinach Pie
ingredients: 2 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen spinach, thawed and drained (you can also use fresh)
directions: Cook sausage meat over medium-heat in skillet until browned, 10 minutes.
Stir often; spoon off fat.
Reserve 1 egg yolk.
In a large bowl, combine remaining eggs, sausage meat, spinach, Mozzarella cheese, Ricotta cheese, salt, pepper and garlic. Prepare pie crust in a 9 or 10-inch pie pan.
Spoon meat mixture into shell.
Roll out top crust and put over filling in pie shell. Make steam vent in top shell.
Brush top with egg yolk and 1 tablespoon water.
Bake at 375° for 1 1/4 hours, until golden. Let stand 10 minutes.
Cut.
Great with a salad.

_enrichment.description: A comforting pie from the heart of British cuisine, this sausage-spinach pie combines flaky pastry with a creamy, cheesy filling. Earthy spinach and savoury sausage create a satisfying meal for any occasion.

title: Strawberry Pizza Pie
directions: Melt butter in a 9 x 13-inch pan; line with vanilla wafers. Mix 2 packages of Dream Whip by directions on box.
Add cream cheese and sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Spread over wafers; add fruit in layer on top and glaze.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant and sweet dessert inspired by American classics, this strawberry pizza pie layers creamy cheesecake filling with fresh fruit on a crispy wafer base. A refreshing treat for summer gatherings.

title: Spaghetti Chicken
ingredients: 4 to 5 lb. chicken, cut up (I use breasts only)
7 to 8 oz. spaghetti, cooked and drained
directions: Wash chicken pieces and pat dry.
Season with 1 teaspoon salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
In a large skillet or Dutch oven, brown chicken in oil; remove chicken.
Pour off all but 3 tablespoons of fat.
Add onions and garlic.
Cook and stir until onion is tender. Stir in chicken and remaining ingredients, except spaghetti and cheese.
Cover tightly; cook chicken slowly for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until tender, stirring occasionally and adding water, if necessary.
Skim off excess fat.
Serve on spaghetti; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American dish, Spaghetti Chicken simmers tender chicken pieces in a rich tomato sauce with aromatic herbs. Perfect for a cosy family dinner with a side of spaghetti.

title: Cheese Mushroom Frittata
directions: In medium bowl with wire whisk, beat soup until smooth. Gradually blend in eggs, 1 cup of cheese, basil and pepper.
In 10-inch oven-safe omelet pan or skillet over medium heat in hot margarine, cook mushrooms and onion until mushrooms are tender and liquid is evaporated, stirring occasionally.
Pour mixture into skillet.
Reduce heat to low.
Cook 6 minutes or until edges are set 1-inch from edge.
Do not stir.
Remove from heat and serve. For garnish, use tomato wedges, chopped fresh parsley or fresh basil leaves.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-inspired frittata brimming with creamy mushrooms, melted mozzarella, and fresh basil. Rich, savoury, and effortlessly elegant, perfect for a quick yet satisfying meal.

title: Dolly'S Spaghetti Sauce
directions: Brown 1 clove of garlic in a tablespoon of oil.
Remove from flame and cool slightly.
Add 1 large can of tomato sauce or puree,
one can tomato paste and 4 cans water.
Add 1 teaspoon salt, 2 teaspoons granulated sugar, garlic powder (2 shakes), sprinkle of black pepper and 1 or 2 basil leaves.
Bring to a boil; lower flame and simmer for 2 hours.
Serves 6 to 8.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian tomato sauce with deep, rich flavours from slow-simmered tomatoes, garlic, and a touch of sugar. A versatile staple for pasta, pizza, or dipping.

title: Tasty Stuffed Pasta Shells
directions: Cook shells and set aside.
In saucepan, saute garlic and mushrooms in margarine.
Mix with cottage cheese, spinach and Mozzarella cheese.
Spoon cottage cheese mixture into cooked shells and place in bottom of 9 x 13-inch pan sprayed with Pam. Pour spaghetti sauce over shells and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Cook at 350° for 30 minutes or until done.

_enrichment.description: Succulent jumbo pasta shells stuffed with a creamy spinach and cheese filling, baked in a tangy tomato sauce. A comforting Italian dish that’s as delicious as it is visually appealing.

title: Betsy Dick'S Fettuccine Alfredo
directions: Melt butter in a saucepan.
Add flour and stir until bubbly. Do not brown.
Immediately add whipping cream and stir well. Mixture should have a fairly thin consistency.
Add Provolone; cut into small cubes, a few at a time and Parmesan, a little at a time.
Season with spices.
If sauce is too thick, thin with milk. When sauce has a smooth, creamy consistency, serve over hot noodles.
Yields 4 to 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: Creamy, indulgent Fettuccine Alfredo with melted Provolone and Parmesan, tossed in a silky sauce. A timeless Italian classic that’s rich, velvety, and utterly satisfying.

title: Zucchini Madeleines(A Quickie Appetizer)
ingredients: 2 Tbsp. fresh basil, chopped or 1 tsp. dried basil
directions: In a colander, mix zucchini with salt.
Let stand until zucchini is limp and liquid has drained.
Rinse and drain zucchini well, squeezing out as much water as possible.
While zucchini is draining, heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wide frying pan over medium heat.
Add onion; stir often until soft.
Remove from heat.

_enrichment.description: Crispy, golden zucchini fritters with a hint of garlic and Parmesan, served as a light yet flavourful appetizer. Fresh basil adds a vibrant touch to this quick and easy dish.

title: Chocolate Italian Cookies
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Pull off a small piece of dough to roll into the size of a walnut.
Bake on a cookie sheet at 325° for 8 to 10 minutes, watching them so that they do not burn.
The nuts, raisins or chocolate chips are optional as you desire.
When cool, frost.

_enrichment.description: Crispy Italian cookies with a rich chocolatey bite, studded with walnuts and raisins for a festive twist. Aromatic cinnamon and cloves add warmth, while a light frosting crowns these melt-in-your-mouth treats.

title: Italian Delight
directions: Cook macaroni according to directions; drain and set aside. Brown meat, onions, pepper and garlic in oleo.
Pour into 6-quart casserole dish and thoroughly stir in all ingredients.
Add cooked macaroni and mix well.
Refrigerate overnight.
Heat oven to 350° and bake approximately 1 1/2 to 2 hours, covered.
You may also put grated cheese on top.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American casserole layered with macaroni, ground beef, and sweet corn in a tangy tomato sauce. Worcestershire and chili powder bring depth, while a cheesy topping makes it irresistibly comforting.

title: Lasagna Rice
directions: Mix together the first 5 ingredients, then mix together the rest of ingredients.
Use a 13 x 9-inch casserole dish.
Put a light layer of sauce mixture on bottom of pan, then a layer of rice mixture, then again sauce, rice and so on.
Top with layer of sauce and then Mozzarella cheese and Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° until hot and bubbly.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, cheesy twist on lasagna, swapping pasta for rice in this Italian comfort dish. Layers of cottage cheese, spaghetti sauce, and melted mozzarella create a rich, satisfying bake.

title: Italian Sauteed Chicken With Italian Mushroom Rice
ingredients: 6 chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
directions: Cut each chicken breast into 3 long strips.
Dredge strips with mixture of flour and white pepper.
In a heavy skillet, melt 1 stick butter and add olive oil, garlic, rosemary and basil.
Saute chicken in this mixture and lightly brown.
Add wine and cook on low heat until 1/2 of wine has been reduced.
This may be done 3 or 4 hours before serving.
When ready to serve, reheat on low heat; remove the chicken and add 1/2 stick butter to remaining gravy. When hot, place chicken pieces on bed of hot Italian Mushroom Rice and spoon on gravy.
Serve immediately.
Serves 4.

_enrichment.description: Tender Italian chicken strips sautéed in a fragrant blend of garlic, rosemary, and white wine, served over a bed of herby mushroom rice. A dish that balances elegance with homely comfort.

title: One Step Pasta Casserole
ingredients: 1 (16 to 19 oz.) can red or white kidney beans
1 c. small pasta (tubetti, orzo or small shells)
2 tsp. chicken flavored instant bouillon (1 envelope)
1/2 (4 oz.) pkg. shredded Mozzarella cheese (1/2 c.)
directions: In a 2 1/2-quart casserole, cook olive oil, garlic and onion, covered, on High 3 to 5 minutes, until tender, stirring halfway through.
Add kidney beans with liquid, tomato sauce, pasta, bouillon and 3/4 cup water.
Cook covered on High 14 to 18 minutes, until pasta is tender.
Stir halfway through.
Stir in peas; sprinkle with cheese.
Let stand, covered, 5 minutes.
Makes 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A quick and easy one-pot pasta casserole with juicy chicken, sweet peas, and a blanket of melted mozzarella. Garlicky tomato sauce and tender pasta make this a fuss-free family favourite.

title: Italian Roasted Potatoes
directions: Peel and cut potatoes lengthwise in quarters.
Place in roaster with onion, celery, parsley and bouillon, mixing well. Add paprika, salt and pepper, again mixing well to taste.
Add oil.
Roast at 350°, turning several times until golden brown.

_enrichment.description: Crispy, golden roasted potatoes infused with smoky paprika and aromatic herbs, a beloved Italian tavern classic. The dish balances earthy potato with sweet onion and celery, finished with a rich, herbaceous bouillon glaze.

title: Baked Lasagna
directions: Saute garlic in tablespoon of olive oil (do not brown garlic). Add tomato puree, water, salt, pepper, oregano and sugar.
Bring to a boil.
Lower heat and simmer for 2 hours.
Brown chopped beef; add parsley, season to taste and add 2 tablespoons grated Parmesan cheese.
Simmer until all chopped beef is cooked through. Set aside.
Using a 6-quart kettle, boil water (with 1 tablespoon salt added).
When a rolling boil starts, add lasagna.
Cook according to directions on package, drain and blanch with cold water.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian lasagna layered with rich tomato sauce, tender beef, and three cheeses for the ultimate comfort dish. The slow-simmered ragù and creamy ricotta create a harmonious blend of sweet, tangy, and savoury notes.

title: Pizza Pasta
ingredients: 2 c. pasta, uncooked (shells, rotini or elbows)
directions: Preheat oven to 375°.
Cook the pasta and drain.
Pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan. Spread pasta evenly across the bottom.
Carefully spoon pizza sauce over the pasta as you would do a pizza.
Top with Canadian bacon, ground pork, pepperoni, onion, green pepper, mushrooms and black olives.
(May add or delete toppings.)
Cover with the Mozzarella cheese and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake at 375° for 20 to 25 minutes.
(May broil the last 2 minutes to brown top.)
Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.

_enrichment.description: A playful fusion of pizza and pasta, this dish layers al dente pasta with tangy pizza sauce and a medley of savoury toppings. Topped with melted mozzarella and parmesan, it delivers a crispy, cheesy crunch in every bite.

title: Pasta Salmon Salad
ingredients: 1 c. cherry tomatoes, cut in half
directions: Cook macaroni according to directions.
Drain and cook.
Place in large bowl and add radishes, green pepper, onion and carrots. In small bowl combine oil, vinegar, garlic, basil and mustard. Pour over pasta and vegetables and toss well.
Refrigerate 1 to 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, add tomatoes and salmon. Toss gently.

_enrichment.description: A refreshing Italian-American salad featuring al dente shell pasta tossed with crisp radishes, peppers, and carrots in a zesty herb dressing. Fresh salmon adds a delicate, flaky texture and subtle umami depth.

title: Chicken And Cheese Lasagna
directions: Saute onion and bell pepper in water over medium-high heat. Add soup, pimientos, milk and basil and mix well.
Arrange half the noodles on the bottom of an 11x7 inch baking dish.
Spread half the soup mixture and half ricotta cheese over noodles. Arrange half the chicken on top of ricotta.
Sprinkle with half cheddar and half parmesan cheese.
Repeat layers of the remaining noodles, soup mixture, ricotta, and chicken.
Bake covered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
Sprinkle with remaining cheddar and parmesan cheese.
Bake uncovered for 4 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, cheesy lasagna with tender chicken and a velvety soup-based sauce, baked to golden perfection. The dish balances rich creaminess with subtle sweetness from pimientos and basil.

title: Chocolate Pizza
ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) jar red maraschino cherries, drained and cut in half
2 Tbsp. green maraschino cherries, drained and quartered
directions: Melt chocolate chips with 14 ounces of almond bark in a large saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth. Remove from heat. Stir marshmallows, cereal and peanuts together.
Pour into greased 12-inch pizza pan.
Top with cherries.
Sprinkle with coconut. Melt remaining 2 ounces almond bark with oil over low heat, stirring until smooth.
Drizzle over coconut. Chill until firm. Store at room temperature.

_enrichment.description: A playful twist on dessert from American cuisine, blending sweet chocolate with crunchy rice cereal and chewy marshmallows. Perfect for sharing with a nostalgic, indulgent flavour profile.

title: Italian Chicken
directions: In a shallow bowl, combine the Parmesan cheese, oregano, parsley, garlic salt and pepper.
Dip the chicken breasts in melted butter, then coat with Parmesan mixture.
Place in a greased 9-inch square baking dish.
Drizzle with any remaining butter.
Bake, uncovered, at 425° for 15 to 20 minutes or until the chicken juices run clear.
Makes 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian dish with tender chicken coated in a fragrant Parmesan-herb crust. Simple yet flavourful, it’s a staple for home cooks seeking authentic taste.

title: Porcini Risotto
ingredients: 1 c. J. Lohr Estates Riverstone Chardonnay
1 lb. mushrooms (use brown ones if available)
directions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Rehydrate the porcini by placing them in a small bowl with hot water; reserve the liquid.
Saute the green onions and carrots in half of the butter for 10 minutes.
Add rice and stir to coat with butter.
Add the wine and 1/2 cup of the beef stock.
Strain the porcini liquid through cheesecloth and add it to the rice.
Remove any grit you find in the water.
Simmer over low heat, stirring and adding more stock as it is absorbed by the rice. Cook until tender, about 30 to 40 minutes.
While the rice is cooking, saute the garlic, porcini and mushrooms in the remaining butter.

_enrichment.description: A luxurious Italian risotto enriched with earthy porcini mushrooms and creamy Gorgonzola. A dish that balances umami and richness, perfect for autumn evenings.

title: Spinach Casserole(Your Kids Will Never Know!)
directions: Thaw spinach.
Brown burger and onion; remove excess grease. In a bowl, combine soup, sour cream, oregano, garlic salt and rice, then add spinach and burger.
Put in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Bake at 350° for 15 minutes.
Top with Mozzarella cheese, then sprinkle on Parmesan cheese.
Bake another 25 to 30 minutes until cheese begins to brown.

_enrichment.description: A sneaky but delicious spinach casserole from American comfort food, hiding greens in a cheesy, creamy bake. Kids and adults alike will love its mild, savoury flavour.

title: Fettucine Carbonara
ingredients: 1 large onion, cut in crescent shape
directions: Brown bacon, drain and crumble; set aside.
Saute onion and bell pepper in bacon grease until onion is barely transparent (pepper and onion should remain firm); set aside.
Cook noodles per instructions; drain noodles.
Do not rinse.
Heat large pot until too hot to touch; turn off heat.
Put butter in pot (get sides of pot coated with butter).
Pour heavy cream in pot.
Add noodles, eggs, sour cream, black pepper, Parmesan cheese, bacon, onion and green pepper.
Work fast after draining noodles; the heat from the noodles cooks the eggs.

_enrichment.description: A Roman classic with al dente fettucine tossed in a creamy, peppery sauce and crispy bacon. Rich yet balanced, it’s a Roman staple for any pasta lover.

title: Pesto Chicken Linguine
ingredients: 2 whole medium chicken breasts, skinned, halved lengthwise, boned and cut into julienne strips
2 medium tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
directions: For pesto sauce, in blender or food processor container, combine spinach, parsley, chicken broth, egg yolk, Parmesan cheese, basil and garlic.
Cover and blend until mixture is pureed.
Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
Keep hot.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian classic where tender chicken meets silky linguine, drenched in a fresh, herby pesto sauce. The dish bursts with the bright flavours of basil, garlic, and Parmesan, balanced by the richness of spinach and a hint of tang from tomatoes.

title: Skillet Or Wok Lasagna
ingredients: 6 lasagna or 18 mafalda noodles, broken up (4 oz.)
1 (15 1/2 oz.) jar spaghetti sauce with meat
directions: In a large saucepan, cook lasagna or noodles in boiling water for 10 to 12 minutes or just until tender.
Drain lasagna noodles and set aside.
Preheat wok or large skillet over high heat. Break up meat.
Stir-fry meat and garlic for 2 to 3 minutes or until meat is brown.
Spoon off fat.
Stir in spaghetti sauce and cooked noodles.

_enrichment.description: A quick-fire twist on lasagna, this Italian-American skillet dish layers pasta, rich cheeses, and spiced ground beef in a single pan. The fusion of creamy cottage cheese and mozzarella delivers a comforting, hearty bite with bold garlic and Italian seasoning.

title: Baked Eggplant Parmesiana
ingredients: 5 medium size eggplants, washed and sliced into very thin pieces
directions: Dip each slice of eggplant into well beaten egg and into seasoned bread crumbs.
Fry breaded eggplant slices in medium to hot oil in frying pan, 2 minutes on each side.
Drain cooked eggplant slices on paper towels.
Layer in glass baking dish some of your favorite tomato sauce, then all of the cooked eggplant. Top with more sauce and finish by topping with some grated Mozzarella cheese and dried oregano.

_enrichment.description: A Mediterranean showstopper where crispy fried eggplant meets layers of tangy tomato sauce and melted mozzarella. This Italian classic, Parmigiana di Melanzane, is a symphony of textures—crunchy, creamy, and gooey—with earthy oregano tying it all together.

title: Pepperoni Pizza Dip
directions: In a small mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sour cream, oregano, garlic powder and red pepper.
Spread evenly in 9 or 10-inch quiche pan or pie plate.
Spread pizza sauce over the top.
Sprinkle with pepperoni, green onions and green pepper. Bake in preheated 350° oven for 10 minutes.
Top with cheese. Bake 5 minutes more, until cheese is melted and mixture is heated through.

_enrichment.description: A playful, shareable dip inspired by pizza flavours, blending creamy cheese with zesty pizza sauce and spicy pepperoni. This Italian-American crowd-pleaser is topped with melted mozzarella and fresh green onions for a fun, interactive appetizer.

title: Italian Country Chicken(6 To 8 Servings)
ingredients: 1 lb. boneless, skinned chicken breast halves, cut into strips
1 (7 oz.) jar roasted red bell peppers (undrained)
1 small can pitted black olives, wedged or sliced
1 pkg. tri-color fusilli, freshly cooked (twisty noodles)
directions: Heat
oil in large heavy skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until translucent, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
Add chicken and stir until cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Mix in artichoke hearts (chopped slightly) with liquid, peppers (chopped into pieces) with liquid and olives and heat through.
Season with salt and pepper.
Pour over pasta and toss well.
Serve, passing Parmesan separately.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian country dish where succulent chicken simmers with bell peppers, olives, and artichokes in a garlicky tomato sauce. Served over tri-colour fusilli, this hearty one-pan meal is finished with a sprinkle of Parmesan for a dish that’s as vibrant as it is satisfying.

title: Veal Parmigiana
ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. veal cutlets (2 x 2-inch slices; 1/4-inch thick)
directions: Pound cutlets until they reach 3 x 3-inch size.
Dip meat into egg and milk mixture, then dip into 3/4 cup dry seasoned bread crumbs.
Sprinkle freely with Parmesan cheese; allow to stand 15 minutes.
Saute in butter or oil until crisp (2 to 4 minutes, each side).
Place in baking sheet, top with your favorite spaghetti sauce and Mozzarella cheese.
Place in preheated oven until cheese melts.
Serves 4 to 5.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian dish where tender veal cutlets are breaded, fried to golden perfection, and smothered in rich tomato sauce and melted mozzarella. The combination of crispy breading and gooey cheese makes every bite irresistible.

title: H And J Pizza
directions: Mix yeast and water together. Set aside.
Mix all the rest of the ingredients together.
Combine both mixtures. Turn dough on floured board.
Knead. Spread on greased pizza pan.
Let stand 15 minutes. Spread spaghetti sauce on dough, then add cooked hamburger meat, mushrooms, cheese, onions, pepper or whatever you like. Preheat oven to 425°.
Cook 15 to 20 minutes. Eat and enjoy.

_enrichment.description: A hearty homemade pizza with a fluffy, buttery crust topped with savoury spaghetti sauce, juicy hamburger meat, and earthy mushrooms. Perfect for a cosy family meal or a casual gathering with friends.

title: Cheesy Lasagna
directions: Saute beef and onion in a deep skillet.
Pour off fat, then add tomatoes and tomato paste and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add 2 beaten eggs to cottage cheese, salt and oregano.
Place cooked noodles at the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch casserole dish, alternating the meat and egg and cottage cheese mixture.
Cover with half of the Mozzarella cheese, then a layer of noodles and repeat.
Cook in oven at 350° for 30 minutes.
Let set about 15 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American classic layered with rich meat sauce, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella between tender lasagna noodles. A dish that warms the soul and satisfies every craving.

title: Stuffed Shells Florentine
ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) pkg. jumbo shells (1 c., Ronzini)
directions: Cook shells according to package directions.
Pour marinara sauce into saucepan and heat.
Spoon 1 cup of sauce into bottom of a large roasting pan or 1/2 cup sauce into each of two 2-quart baking pans.
Reserve remaining sauce; keep warm.

_enrichment.description: Jumbo pasta shells stuffed with a creamy ricotta and spinach filling, baked in a tangy marinara sauce and topped with melted mozzarella. A delightful vegetarian option that’s as colourful as it is delicious.

title: Country Style Chicken Kiev
directions: Preheat oven to 375°.
In heavy 2-quart saucepan, melt butter. Combine bread crumbs and next 4 ingredients.
Dip chicken breast halves in melted butter; roll in bread crumb mixture.
Place in ungreased 9-inch square baking dish.
Bake in center of oven 50 minutes or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, add diced onion to remaining melted butter (1/2 cup).
Saute onion; add wine and chopped parsley.
Pour over golden brown chicken breasts.
Return to oven 3 to 5 minutes more just to heat sauce.
Serve with sauce spooned over breasts.

_enrichment.description: Succulent chicken breasts stuffed with garlic-herb butter, breaded to crispy perfection, and finished with a white wine and parsley sauce. A showstopper dish that’s surprisingly simple to prepare.

title: Stuffed Jumbo Shells And Tofu
ingredients: 2 Tbsp. each chopped parsley, Parmesan cheese, wheat germ and diced onion
1/2 tsp. each celery seed and basil
directions: Cook, drain and rinse shells.
Combine remaining ingredients except spaghetti sauce and the extra Parmesan cheese.
Spread 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce in bottom of shallow baking dish.
Fill shells with tofu mix and place in single layer in baking dish.
Top with remaining sauce and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 375° for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Makes 6 servings. Calories 277.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American dish where jumbo pasta shells are stuffed with a savoury tofu and herb filling, baked in rich tomato sauce and topped with Parmesan. Enjoy the creamy texture and umami-packed flavours of this vegetarian twist on a classic.

title: Zucchini Cheese Casserole
directions: Saute zucchini and chopped onion in oil.
Whip cottage cheese with basil and oregano in blender. Place alternating layers of zucchini, cottage cheese and tomatoes in a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
Top with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° uncovered for 25 to 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A light yet satisfying Italian casserole featuring tender zucchini layered with herby cottage cheese and tangy tomatoes, finished with a crisp Parmesan topping. Perfect for a summer evening with its fresh, herbaceous notes.

title: Italian Delight(Large Portion)
ingredients: 1 can Ragu Thick and Hearty sauce (plain)
directions: Take the cubed steak and set it into the pan (with Crisco) on medium-low.
While steak is cooking, chop the veggies into fine pieces and place them in a bowl (with the cheese).
When the meat is done, put it in with the veggies.
Put the whole jar of Ragu into the pan (simmer with a little bit of water).

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American one-pot dish combining tender cubed steak with a medley of sautéed vegetables in a rich tomato sauce, finished with melted mozzarella. A robust, flavourful meal for a cosy dinner.

title: Italian Sausage And Bean Soup
ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) can white cannellini or Great Northern beans, drained
1/4 tsp. each: thyme, basil and oregano
1 c. whole natural almonds, toasted (if desired)
directions: Cut sausage into 1/2-inch pieces; brown in large heavy saucepan over medium heat.
Drain off all but 1 tablespoon fat. Stir in onions; cook 5 to 8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft, but not browned.
Stir in garlic and celery; cook until soft, 5 to 8 minutes.
Stir in cabbage, tomatoes, beans, chicken broth, thyme, basil, oregano and bay leaf.
Cover and bring to a boil.
Simmer 30 minutes.
Discard bay leaf.
Stir in almonds.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian soup brimming with spiced sausage, tender cabbage, and creamy cannellini beans in a fragrant broth. The nutty almonds add a delightful crunch, making it a wholesome winter warmer.

title: Summer Squash Pasta
directions: Cut zucchini and squash into fourths lengthwise, then into 1/2-inch sections crosswise.
Dice onion; mince garlic.
Fry onion in enough oil to keep it from sticking.
Add garlic when onion is soft.
Then add squash.
Cook on medium heat, stirring occasionally, until mixture collapses and becomes soft.
Remove from heat and add cheese, the salt and pepper to taste (cheese is quite salty).
Serve over or mix into pasta adding more olive oil as needed.
Serve with green salad if desired.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant summer pasta dish where delicate summer squash and zucchini are sautéed with garlic and onion until silky, then tossed with angel hair pasta for a light, fresh meal. A celebration of seasonal produce.

title: Meatza Pie
ingredients: 1/2 c. Pepperidge Farm herb stuffing crumbs
directions: Place beef, garlic salt and stuffing in pie pan.
Add milk and mix together with fork.
Spread mixture evenly over bottom of pan with a rim around the edge.
Spread tomato paste over meat. Sprinkle oregano and mushrooms over paste.
Top with cheeses. Bake 20 minutes at 400°.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American twist on pizza, this Meatza Pie combines savoury ground beef with aromatic herbs and melted cheeses for a comforting, umami-rich dish. Perfect for a quick weeknight meal or a casual dinner party.

title: Quick And Easy Lasagne
directions: Brown hamburger and drain.
Mix with spaghetti sauce, drained mushrooms and water.
Layer in 9 x 13-inch pan: meat sauce, uncooked lasagne noodles, cottage cheese, Mozzarella and Parmesan cheese, beginning and ending with meat sauce.
Sprinkle top with Parmesan.
Cover with heavy duty foil and seal tightly.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.
Let stand 15 to 20 minutes before removing foil.

_enrichment.description: This Italian classic layers al dente lasagne with rich meat sauce, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella for a deeply satisfying dish. Ideal for a cosy family dinner or a meal-prep favourite.

title: Homemade Pizza
directions: Follow directions on package for bread dough except use cookie sheet.
Spread dough on a greased sheet.
Cook hamburger meat, sausage, onions and green peppers.
Spread tomato sauce on bread dough; sprinkle with garlic salt, if desired.
When meat mixture is about cooked, drain and spread over dough.
Add mushrooms and pepperoni.
Bake at 350° for about 1 hour.

_enrichment.description: A timeless Italian-American favourite, this Homemade Pizza features a crispy crust topped with tangy tomato sauce, melted cheese, and a medley of savoury meats and fresh vegetables. A must-try for pizza lovers.

title: Broiled Stuffed Mushrooms
directions: Rinse mushrooms and wipe gently with a paper towel to dry. Remove stems and chop finely.
Saute stems in butter for 2-3 minutes.
Add bread crumbs, nuts, garlic chives, basil and tarragon.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

_enrichment.description: These Broiled Stuffed Mushrooms are a French-inspired starter, filled with a fragrant blend of breadcrumbs, herbs, and nuts, then baked to golden perfection. A delightful appetiser for any occasion.

title: Seafood Lasagna
ingredients: 1 lb. shelled shrimp, cooked and halved
1 (7 1/2 oz.) can crabmeat, drained and flaked
directions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions; drain. Arrange 4 noodles in bottom of greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
Cook onion in butter until tender; blend in cream cheese. Stir in cottage cheese, egg, basil, 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/8 teaspoon pepper; spread half atop noodles.
Combine soup, milk and wine.
Stir in shrimp and crab; spread half over cottage cheese layer.
Repeat layers.
Sprinkle with Parmesan.
Bake, uncovered, in a 350° oven for 45 minutes.
Top with shredded sharp cheese. Bake 2 to 3 minutes more.
Let stand 15 minutes before serving. Makes 12 servings.
(Garnish with tomato, parsley and extra shrimp.)

_enrichment.description: This luxurious Seafood Lasagna combines delicate crab and shrimp with creamy cheeses and white wine-infused sauce, layered between al dente noodles. A decadent dish for special occasions or a gourmet treat.

title: Penne All'Arrabbiata(Milano, Italy)
ingredients: 1 small chili pepper or 1 tsp. dried crushed chilies (hot red pepper flakes)
directions: Heat the oil and gently fry the chopped onion and garlic until softened.
Add the chili pepper and fry gently for 1 minute.
Add the tomatoes with their juice, sugar, salt and pepper to taste and cook on a high flame, uncovered, for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
When the sauce is reduced and thick, check the season.
If you like a smoother sauce, you can pass the sauce through the medium disk of a food mill.
I usually just chop up the tomatoes with a fork and leave the sauce a bit chunky.
Add the chopped parsley just before serving.
Cook the pasta following the directions on the packet very carefully to avoid overcooking.

_enrichment.description: A fiery Roman classic that turns simple tomatoes into a bold, spicy sauce with a touch of sweetness. This dish balances the heat of chili with the freshness of parsley, creating a vibrant, herbaceous flavour that’s quintessentially Italian.

title: Meatless Spaghetti Sauce
directions: In a 2-quart saucepan under medium heat, saute onion, garlic and crushed red pepper in margarine and olive oil until tender. Add basil, oregano and thyme.
Pour in stewed tomatoes, roughly chopping up the individual tomatoes to desired consistency.
Add tomato paste and mix thoroughly.
Mix in the honey and turn down heat to low.
Simmer, stirring frequently, for about 20 minutes. Serve with pasta of choice.

_enrichment.description: A hearty, aromatic sauce that transforms humble ingredients into a rich, layered tomato dish. The blend of herbs and a hint of honey adds depth, making it a comforting, versatile Italian staple perfect for any pasta lover.

title: Aunt T'S String Pie
ingredients: 8 oz. spaghetti hot, cooked and drained
directions: Cook beef, onion and green pepper in a large skillet over medium high heat until meat is brown, stirring to separate meat. Drain fat.
Stir in sauces; mix well.
Combine spaghetti, Romano cheese, eggs and butter in large bow; mix well.
Place in bottom of 13 x 9-inch pan.
Spread Ricotta cheese over top.
Pour sauce mixture over Ricotta cheese.
Sprinkle Mozzarella cheese over top. Bake in pre-heated oven 350° until cheese melts, approximately 20 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A nostalgic Italian-American casserole where layers of spaghetti, rich tomato sauce, and melted cheeses create a comforting, cheesy delight. The combination of ricotta and mozzarella adds a creamy, indulgent texture that’s pure comfort food.

title: Sicilian Meat Roll
directions: Combine eggs, breadcrumbs, tomato juice, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper and garlic.
Stir in ground beef, mixing well with hands.
On waxed paper, pat meat to a 12 x 10-inch rectangle. Arrange ham slices on top of meat, leaving a small margin around edge.
Sprinkle shredded cheese over ham.
Starting from short end, carefully roll up meat, using paper to lift; seal edges and ends.
Bake in 350° oven for 1 1/4 hours.
Place cheese wedges over top of roll.
Return to oven for 5 minutes, or until cheese melts.
Serve with watermelon pickle or sweet relish.
Serves 6 to 8.

_enrichment.description: A Sicilian showstopper where a savoury meat roll is stuffed with ham and melted mozzarella, then baked to golden perfection. The blend of herbs and spices infuses the beef with aromatic depth, making this a festive centrepiece for any Italian feast.

title: Lazy Lasagna
directions: Brown meat in a large saucepan and drain.
Add next 4 ingredients.
Bring to boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix Ricotta cheese or cottage cheese, egg and Parmesan cheese.
Put a little of the meat sauce in bottom of 13 x 9 baking dish and alternate layers as follows:
noodles, 1/3 meat sauce, half of cheese mixture.
Repeat and then top with remaining meat sauce.
Sprinkle Mozzarella cheese on top and cover with foil. Bake at 350° for one hour or until noodles are tender.
Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.

_enrichment.description: A simplified take on lasagna that skips the fuss but delivers all the cheesy, meaty goodness. Layers of pasta, rich tomato sauce, and a creamy ricotta-parmesan mix make this a satisfying, no-fuss Italian classic.

title: Pasta With Chicken
directions: In large skillet, melt butter.
Add chicken, onion and garlic; cook until chicken and onion are tender.

Stir in spaghetti sauce. Reduce heat; simmer, covered, stirring frequently, 10 minutes. Meanwhile, cook pasta according to package directions; drain. Serve sauce over hot pasta; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American classic blending tender chicken with rich spaghetti sauce over al dente spaghetti, finished with a sprinkle of Parmesan. Hearty and satisfying, it's a crowd-pleaser with bold tomato and garlic notes.

title: Pasta With Broccoli Di Rape And Sausage
ingredients: 2 Tbsp. olive oil or vegetable oil
1 lb. medium pasta shells or any small size pasta of choice
directions: Remove the long stems and tough outer leaves from the Broccoli di Rape.
Keep florets and small leaves, cut up, place in colander and wash several times.
Pour oil into pan on medium heat.
Lightly crush garlic, place in heated oil and allow to turn golden, then remove garlic if you wish.
Remove casing from sausage, place meat in pan and cook thoroughly, breaking the pieces of meat apart as they continue to cook.
If you still have not removed the garlic, do so now.
Drain all but 1 tablespoon oil from pan; add Broccoli di Rape to pan and mix with cooked sausage.
Keep mixing together, add your broth, mix and cook for approximately 5 minutes.
Mix flour and butter together to form a roux and stir into your mixture.
Cook approximately 5 minutes more until sauce thickens. Serve over pasta and add the grated Italian cheese of choice.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian dish featuring bitter Broccoli di Rape, savoury turkey sausage, and tender pasta shells in a light broth. Earthy, herbaceous, and slightly spicy, it's a true taste of Southern Italy.

title: My Favorite Pasta-Garlic Clam Sauce
directions: Saute onion, green pepper and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
(Add a little water and cover if necessary.) Add mushrooms and continue heating in covered saucepan for about 3 minutes.
Add remaining ingredients, including all liquid from clams; heat until hot in covered saucepan.
Serve with 1 cup spaghetti or linguine (2 ounces dry) per serving.
Top with Parmesan cheese.

_enrichment.description: A briny, garlicky clam sauce with a hint of spice and fresh parsley, tossed with al dente pasta. A coastal Italian classic that balances sweet clams with bold Mediterranean herbs.

title: Shrimp And Pepper Pasta
ingredients: 2 medium onions, cut into thin wedges
1 lb. medium size shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 medium green pepper, cut into thin strips
directions: Cook onion and garlic in oil in large skillet or wok until onion is tender, but not brown.
Add shrimp and peppers; cook about 4 minutes or until shrimp is cooked through, stirring constantly.
Add tomatoes, picante sauce, basil and oregano; heat through.
Toss with linguine.
Serve with additional picante sauce.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Tex-Mex-Italian fusion with juicy shrimp, colourful peppers, and a zesty picante kick. Quick to make and packed with fresh basil and oregano for a lively, summery dish.

title: Cheese And Pasta In A Pot
directions: Cook ground beef in small amount of oil in large deep skillet until brown.
Drain excess fat.
Add onions, garlic, spaghetti sauce, stewed tomatoes and undrained mushrooms; mix well.
Simmer 20 minutes.
Cook macaroni, drain and rinse in cold water (as per package directions).
Pour half of shells into deep casserole. Cover with half of tomato-meat mixture and half of sour cream. Top with Provolone.
Repeat layering and end with Mozzarella cheese.
Cover casserole.
Bake at 350° for 35 to 40 minutes. Remove cover and bake until cheese melts and browns.

_enrichment.description: A hearty, cheesy baked pasta casserole layered with ground beef, mushrooms, and tangy tomato sauce. Comforting and indulgent, it's a one-pot wonder perfect for family dinners.

title: Spinach Trenette Agata(Pasta)
ingredients: 8 Roma tomatoes, peeled and diced (about 2 1/2 c.)
12 oz. fresh spinach trenette pasta (similar to linguine)
directions: Cook pasta to al dente and drain.
In large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat and saute shrimp for 2 to 3 minutes or until shrimp are firm and opaque.
Remove shrimp; set aside. Add tomatoes and mushrooms to skillet and saute for 5 minutes. Stir in brandy, basil, salt and pepper.
Add cream and cook until sauce is reduced by 1/3, about 5 to 7 minutes.
Stir in Parmesan. Reduce heat to low and add shrimp to sauce.
Stir for 1 to 2 minutes to heat shrimp.
In heated serving dish, pour sauce over warm pasta, toss gently and serve.

_enrichment.description: A luxurious Italian pasta dish from Liguria, where fresh basil and Parmesan cheese meet succulent shrimp in a creamy, brandy-infused sauce. Rich, umami-packed flavours shine with a touch of acidity from tomatoes.

title: Turkey Tetrazzini
ingredients: 6 c. leftover turkey or chicken, cut in 1 1/2-inch pieces
directions: Melt 3/4 cup of butter in a large saucepan.
Remove from heat and stir in flour, salt and nutmeg.
Gradually add 4 cups of milk and stock and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Boil 2 minutes or until slightly thickened.
In a small bowl, beat egg yolks with remaining milk; pour 2 tablespoons of hot mixture into yolks and then pour yolk mixture into saucepan, beating constantly until sauce is hot.
Do not boil.
Remove from heat and stir in sherry or wine.

_enrichment.description: A classic American-Italian fusion dish, Turkey Tetrazzini is a creamy, comforting casserole with tender turkey, mushrooms, and a sherry-infused béchamel sauce. Perfect for a cosy winter meal with a rich, savoury profile.

title: Spaghetti And Meat Balls
directions: Mix all ingredients and form small meat balls.
Place in a pie plate and microwave on High until meat balls are almost fully cooked (about 6 to 7 minutes).
Rearrange once.
Give dish 1/2 turn during cooking.
Repeat procedure until all meat balls are cooked. Add to spaghetti sauce the last hour of simmering.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American classic, Spaghetti and Meat Balls features tender, herby meatballs simmered in a rich tomato sauce. The dish is a symphony of savoury, umami, and slightly sweet flavours, ideal for a family feast.

title: Mozzarella Meat Loaf
directions: Mix turkey, Egg Beaters, crumbs, milk (1 cup skimmed), Parmesan cheese, onion, salt and oregano.
Shape into loaf and place in a greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan.
Bake at 350° for 1 to 1 1/4 hours or until no pink remains; drain.
Spoon pizza sauce over loaf and top with Mozzarella cheese slices.
Return to oven for 10 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings.

_enrichment.description: A modern twist on meatloaf, this Mozzarella Meat Loaf combines ground turkey with Parmesan and melted mozzarella for a juicy, cheesy centre. A comforting, protein-rich dish with Italian-inspired flavours, perfect for any season.

title: Chef Tony Lasagna
ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 lb. ground beef or turkey
3 (10 1/2 oz.) cans meatless Italian sauce (4 c.)
directions: Cook lasagna according to package directions.
Cook beef, garlic and onions in large saucepan for 10 minutes.
Add next 3 ingredients; mix well and let simmer 15 minutes.
In bowl, combine cottage cheese and eggs.
Grease a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch baking pan.
Arrange several alternate layers of cooked and drained lasagna, sliced cheese, meat sauce and cottage cheese mixture, beginning with lasagna and ending with meat sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° for 45 to 55 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A decadent Italian-American lasagna layered with rich meat sauce, creamy cheese, and savoury kielbasa sausage. This dish is a celebration of bold, umami-packed flavours and hearty textures, ideal for festive occasions.

title: Microwave Cabbage Rolls Italian Style
directions: In 3-quart casserole, place cabbage and water.
Cover and microwave on High for 7 to 9 minutes until leaves are pliable. While cabbage is cooking, mix together ground beef, egg, rice, onion and salt.
Divide meat mixture into 8 equal portions.
Place one portion on each partially cooked cabbage leaf and roll meat into leaf, securing with toothpick if necessary.
Return to 3-quart casserole, placing rolls seam side down.
Blend tomato sauce, sugar and oregano.
Pour over cabbage rolls.
Cover and microwave on High 15 to 17 minutes, rotating dish half turn and basting with sauce after 9 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A clever Italian twist on classic cabbage rolls, using microwave convenience for tender cabbage leaves wrapped around a savoury beef and rice filling. The dish is enriched with a tangy tomato sauce infused with oregano and a touch of sweetness.

title: Pushcart Palpetta(Spaghetti Sauce)
directions: Remove and chop the stems from mushrooms.
Heat 3 tablespoons oil in large skillet; saute mushroom caps, round side down first, for 3 minutes.
Turn and repeat.
Brown sausages; discard fat. Heat 3 tablespoons oil; saute mushroom stems, green pepper, onion and celery until brown.
Move to side; cook hamburg.
Cut sausages into 1/2-inch slices; return to skillet.
Add salt, oregano, basil, parsley, tomato sauce and dry red wine.
Cover; simmer slowly for 45 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Neapolitan-style spaghetti sauce bursting with umami from mushrooms, sweet Italian sausage, and aromatic herbs. This pushcart-inspired dish balances rich, meaty flavours with a touch of acidity from red wine and tomatoes.

title: Angel Hair Pasta And Tomato Vinaigrette
directions: Cook pasta in boiling salted water until tender; drain. Combine tomatoes, garlic, basil, oil, vinegar and red pepper flakes in skillet.
Season with salt and pepper.
Cook until tomatoes are barely heated through and still firm, about 3 minutes.
Pour over drained pasta.
Makes 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A light and vibrant Italian-inspired pasta dish featuring delicate angel hair nestled in a fresh tomato vinaigrette. The dish balances sweet tomatoes, aromatic garlic, and a hint of heat from red pepper, finished with fragrant basil.

title: Pasta With Artichokes
ingredients: 1 pkg. frozen artichoke hearts or 12 tiny fresh artichokes
8 oz. fresh fettuccine (white, green or mixed)
1/3 c. toasted cashews, pine nuts or almonds, chopped
directions: Trim artichokes and prepare as for hearts, cutting in halves or quarters.
Or, if using frozen artichokes, thaw and use as they come in the package.
Saute onion in butter until translucent.
Add garlic, wine, lemon juice and artichokes.
Cover and cook over medium heat 1 to 2 minutes.
Add heavy cream and cook, uncovered, 2 to 3 minutes longer until mixture thickens slightly.
Add fresh fettuccine, cooked, chopped nuts and Parmesan cheese.
Toss, then add salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
Serve with warm soup, sourdough French bread and Chardonnay wine for a Monterey Bay, California experience.

_enrichment.description: A luxurious Italian pasta dish where creamy fettuccine meets tender artichokes in a velvety white wine and lemon sauce. The dish is elevated with buttery richness, nutty cashews, and a sharp finish of Parmesan cheese.

title: Savory Italian Rice Bake
directions: Prepare Rice-A-Roni mix as package directs.
Remove sausage from casing and crumble.
In 12-inch skillet, brown sausage and onion; drain, reserving 1 tablespoon drippings in skillet.
Set aside.
Add zucchini and garlic; saute over medium-high heat 1 minute.
Cover, continue cooking over low heat about 2 minutes or until crisp-tender.
Combine prepared Rice-A-Roni, sausage mixture, 1 1/2 cups spaghetti sauce and basil; spread into 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
Sprinkle with 1 cup cheese.
Bake at 350° for 25 to 30 minutes, or until heated through.
Let stand 5 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American bake combining cheesy Rice-A-Roni with crumbled sausage, zucchini, and a rich spaghetti sauce. Topped with melted mozzarella, this dish is a nostalgic fusion of convenience and home-style flavour.

title: Pasta With Vegetables And Goat Cheese
ingredients: 1 small yellow squash, halved lengthwise and sliced
8 oz. light or fat free cream cheese
1 roasted red pepper, cut in strips
directions: Combine broth, wine, shallots and black pepper in large saucepan.

Bring to a boil, add broccoli, breaking florets apart. Add squash and mushrooms, reduce heat, cover and simmer 5 minutes. Add cream cheese, goat cheese and lemon juice, cook on low heat, stirring constantly until cheeses are melted.
Set aside, keeping warm.
Cook pasta according to package directions, drain.
Place in large serving bowl, add vegetable/cheese mixture, toss gently. Garnish with red pepper strips.
Serves 6 to 8.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-inspired pasta dish bursting with seasonal vegetables and creamy goat cheese, balanced by a zesty lemon kick. Fresh herbs and a hint of red pepper add a subtle warmth.

title: Fat Free T'S Easy Lasagna
ingredients: ground turkey or extra lean ground beef
directions: Brown and drain meat.
Add spaghetti sauce, onions and green pepper.
Add enough spaghetti sauce to make thinner than usual. Cook slowly until well blended.
Combine grated Mozzarella cheese with cottage cheese and Egg Beaters.
In a 9 x 13-inch pan spread a thin layer of the meat mixture, then the uncooked lasagna noodles.
Top with meat mixture and a layer of cheese mixture. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Continue layering and end with Parmesan cheese topping.
Bake at 350° for 1 hour.

_enrichment.description: A lighter take on classic lasagna, blending lean turkey, fresh vegetables, and a trio of cheeses for a rich yet guilt-free Italian comfort dish. Perfect for a cozy family dinner.

title: Chicken With Pasta And Broccoli
ingredients: 1/2 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2-inch wide strips
pinch of crushed red pepper flakes
1/2 lb. rotini pasta, cooked according to pkg. directions and drained
directions: In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
Saute the garlic for about 1 minute until golden, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken strips and saute until white and almost completely cooked.
Add the broccoli and saute until crisp-tender, then add the sun-dried tomatoes, red pepper flakes, salt and pepper.
Add the wine, then the broth and butter and cook for about 3 to 5 minutes, or until heated through, stirring occasionally.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian one-pan wonder featuring tender chicken, crisp broccoli, and sun-dried tomatoes in a garlicky white wine broth. Finished with buttery pasta and a sprinkle of Parmesan.

title: Herbed Lentils And Rice
directions: Combine broth and lentils, onion, uncooked rice, wine and seasonings.
Shred 1/2 ounce cheese and stir into ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole dish and bake, covered, at 350° for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until lentils and rice are done, stirring twice.
Cut remaining cheese into strips and uncover casserole.
Top with cheese strips.
Bake an additional 2 to 3 minutes more until cheese melts.
Makes 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty French-inspired lentil and rice bake, infused with aromatic herbs and white wine, topped with melted Swiss cheese. A wholesome, protein-packed dish for any season.

title: Vegetarian Lasagna(Makes 8 Servings)
ingredients: 2 c. tomato sauce, canned tomatoes or thinned paste
3/4 lb. sliced mushrooms, sauteed in olive oil
3/4 c. dry, small, red beans, cooked tender
directions: Rinse the cooked noodles in cold water.
Set them aside. Saute the onions and garlic in the olive oil until soft and transparent, but not browned.
Stir in the tomato, oregano, basil, parsley and salt.
Cook sauce about 1/2 hour, simmering it and stirring often until it has thickened.
Stir in the sauteed mushrooms and cooked beans.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian vegetarian lasagna layered with mushrooms, red beans, and a trio of cheeses, all enveloped in a rich tomato-herb sauce. A satisfying meat-free feast.

title: Spaghetti(With Homemade Pastas Of Course!)
ingredients: 2 1/2 lb. lean beef, cut into bite size pieces (if bone is removed, cook with meat and throw away later)
1 (6 oz.) can tomato paste or 6 medium size tomatoes
1 large bunch celery (leaves and tops only), chopped
1/2 green and 1/2 red bell pepper, cube chopped medium fine
directions: In a large Dutch oven, lightly brown the meat in oil and garlic at medium-low heat.

Slowly mix in water and tomato paste. Add onions, celery and bell peppers. Simmer, covered, 3 to 5 hours until meat is very tender. Check often and add water as needed, making certain there is about a quart of thin sauce when ready to add the pasta.
Add salt, pepper and homemade pasta.
Simmer, uncovered, 20 minutes to 1/2 hour, stirring often, until broth is absorbed.
Stir in parsley. Serves 6.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian classic, this slow-cooked ragù is a labour of love from Emilia-Romagna. Rich, umami-packed tomato sauce simmers for hours with tender beef, aromatic vegetables, and delicate homemade pasta for a deeply satisfying dish.

title: Mary Bradshaw'S Bourbon Hot Dogs
directions: Cut hog dogs in bite size pieces.
Put on cookie sheet in 350° oven just until cuts are sealed.
Mix catsup, sugar, rosemary, oregano, basil and bourbon and bring to a boil.
Add hot dogs. Best to do day before so flavor can set in.

_enrichment.description: A playful American twist on hot dogs, infused with smoky bourbon and aromatic herbs. Sweet, tangy, and slightly spicy, these bite-sized morsels are perfect for casual gatherings or a quick weeknight treat.

title: Italian Sausage Peppers
ingredients: 1 lb. sweet or hot Italian sausage
directions: Cut sausage into 1-inch pieces; saute in oil in large skillet until lightly browned.
Remove from heat.
Saute cut up peppers and onions until tender.
Add sausage and other ingredients. Stir; cook 15 to 20 minutes on low heat.
Serve over noodles, rice or rolls.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-American dish where sweet peppers and onions mingle with savoury sausage in a fragrant tomato broth. Bursting with fresh basil and oregano, it’s a colourful, rustic one-pan meal best served with crusty bread or rice.

title: Pasta Nugget Salad
ingredients: 2 c. cubed, cooked ham or chicken
3/4 c. bottled low-fat Italian salad dressing
directions: Prepare pasta according to package directions; drain.
In large bowl, combine pasta and remaining ingredients; toss to mix. Serve immediately or cover and chill.
Stir gently before serving. Refrigerate leftovers.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: A refreshing, no-fuss Italian-inspired salad with al dente pasta, tender chicken, and crisp vegetables. Tossed in a tangy mustard dressing, it’s a light and satisfying meal-prep favourite for warm days.

title: Italian Fish Fillets
ingredients: 2 lb. fish fillets, skin and bones removed (about 1/2-inch thick)
2 Tbsp. chopped fresh parsley (1 Tbsp. if dry)
directions: Heat oven to 350°.
Cut fish into serving size pieces. Arrange in greased baking dish.
Sprinkle with parsley, basil, oregano and pepper.
Top with spaghetti sauce, then sprinkle with cheese.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until fish flakes easily at the thickest part.

_enrichment.description: A simple yet elegant Italian bake where delicate fish fillets are smothered in rich tomato sauce and melted mozzarella. Fragrant with fresh herbs, it’s a quick and comforting dish perfect for a midweek dinner.

title: Zucchini Parmesan(Can Substitute Eggplant For Zucchini)
directions: On wax paper, combine bread crumbs with oregano.
Cut zucchini lengthwise.
Brush with mayo; coat with crumb mixture.
In 2 1/2-quart casserole dish, arrange zucchini, crumb side up.
Cook, covered with wax paper on High for 12 to 15 minutes, until tender, rotating halfway through cooking time.
In small bowl, cook spaghetti sauce on High for 1 to 3 minutes, until hot.
Meanwhile sprinkle 1 1/2 cups Mozzarella cheese over zucchini.
Spoon sauce over cheese; top with remaining Mozzarella cheese and Parmesan cheese.
Cook on High for 2 to 4 minutes until cheese melts.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian classic with crispy breaded zucchini layered with rich tomato sauce and melted cheeses. Enjoy the perfect balance of tangy tomato, creamy mozzarella, and savoury parmesan.

title: Baked Plum Tomatoes With Linguini
directions: In a 13 x 9-inch glass Pyrex dish, pour a layer of olive oil. Cut up about 10 plum ripe tomatoes in halves.
Sprinkle on top lots of fresh garlic, salt and pepper, basil or spice and oregano (optional).
Bake in 350° oven until the tomatoes get a little soft or to the consistency you like (approximately 35 minutes). It doesn't look like tomato sauce.
Cook up linguini and add to the Pyrex dish that the tomatoes are in.
Toss and serve.

_enrichment.description: A simple yet elegant Italian dish where sweet plum tomatoes are roasted with garlic and herbs, then tossed with al dente linguini. A light, herbaceous summer delight.

title: Chicken Tortellini Soup
ingredients: 1 (10 3/4 oz.) can cream of chicken soup
directions: In large saucepan, combine water, broth, soup, chicken, onion, garlic, basil and oregano.
Bring to a boil; simmer uncovered 30 minutes.
Add tortellini and vegetables.
Simmer 10 minutes. Serve with cheese.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American soup brimming with tender chicken, pillowy tortellini, and a creamy broth. A comforting bowl of savoury goodness.

title: Maria Solace'S Tiramisu Dessert
ingredients: 1(16 oz.) container Mascarpone cream (can be purchased at an Italian specialty store)
2 tsp. instant coffee (expresso coffee with a little sugar is best if you have it)
Savoiardi biscuits (can be found at the Food Emporium)
directions: In a bowl, beat cream, confectioners sugar, coffee liqueur, vanilla extract and 2/3 of grated chocolate.
Set aside remaining chocolate for top of dessert.
In another bowl, beat whipping cream until peaks form.
With rubber spatula, fold cream into Mascarpone mixture.
In a third bowl, mix coffee, liqueur, half teaspoon vanilla extract.
Dip Savoiardi biscuits into this mixture and line a cake pan (glass) or trifle bowl.
Spread some of the cream mixture over the biscuits and continue layering until cream mixture is finished.
Top with cocoa and grated chocolate.
If you desire, you can pipe out rosettes with whipped cream on top of dessert and dust peaks with cocoa powder.
Refrigerate.

_enrichment.description: A luscious Italian tiramisu with layers of coffee-soaked biscuits, mascarpone cream, and chocolate. A decadent dessert for any special occasion.

title: Zucchini Casserole(Lasagna Type)
ingredients: 15 oz. tomato sauce or homemade tomatoes
directions: Brown meat, onion and garlic.
Stir in tomatoes and spices. Simmer, uncovered, 10 minutes.
Combine cottage cheese, egg and Parmesan cheese; set aside.
Slice zucchini.
Put in casserole dish (13 x 9 x 2-inch), half of zucchini, half of cottage cheese mixture, half meat mixture.
Then repeat and bake at 350° for 1 hour.

_enrichment.description: A hearty zucchini lasagna with layers of savoury meat, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella. A comforting dish with rich, earthy flavours.

title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pizza
ingredients: 1 1/2 c. Pillsbury's Best all-purpose or unbleached flour
6 oz. pkg. (1 c.) semi-sweet chocolate chips
directions: Heat oven to 375°.
In large bowl, combine sugar, brown sugar, margarine, peanut butter, vanilla and egg; blend well.
Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off.
Stir in flour.
Press dough evenly over bottom of 12 or 14-inch pizza pan, forming rim along edge.
Bake at 375° for 10 minutes.
Sprinkle with marshmallows and chocolate chips; continue to bake for 5 to 8 minutes or until marshmallows are puffy and lightly browned. Cool; cut into wedges.
Store in tightly covered container.
Makes 20 servings.
