_enrichment.description: A decadent American-inspired dessert pizza from the US, blending rich chocolate and nutty peanut butter flavours with a soft, marshmallow-studded base. Perfect for sharing at parties or as a fun treat.

title: Chicken Minestrone
ingredients: 3/4 lb. Country Pride boneless skinless chicken breasts or chicken tenders
2 (14 1/2 oz.) cans lower-sodium or regular chicken broth
1 (15 oz.) can garbanzo or kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 c. loose pack frozen mixed vegetables
1/2 c. cavatelli or other small pasta
1 tsp. dried basil or thyme, crushed
directions: Rinse chicken; pat dry.
Cut chicken into bite size pieces. In a large saucepan, stir together broth, beans, mixed vegetables, onion, cavatelli, basil and pepper.
Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American soup with tender chicken, beans, and cavatelli pasta in a savoury broth. Packed with vegetables and herbs, it’s a comforting bowl for any season.

title: Seafood Linguine Mornay
ingredients: 1/2 c. each sliced mushrooms and chopped onions
2 oz. each Swiss and Parmesan cheese
10 oz. each fresh or frozen deveined shrimp and scallops
directions: In 10-inch nonstick skillet stir 1 tablespoon margarine until bubbles and hot; add broccoli, mushrooms and onion and cook stirring quickly and frequently until vegetables are tender crisp. Using a slotted spoon remove vegetables from skillet and set aside.
In same skillet heat remaining tablespoon margarine.
When bubbly and hot stir in flour stirring for about 1 minute. Gradually stir in milk and Tabasco at medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture is smooth and thickened.
Add cheese and cook, stirring frequently until melted.
Return sauteed vegetables to skillet and add seafood and linguine and toss to combine. Reduce heat to low and cook until thoroughly heated.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper and stir to combine.

_enrichment.description: A luxurious French-inspired seafood pasta dish with creamy Mornay sauce, tender shrimp, and al dente linguine. The broccoli and mushrooms add a fresh, earthy contrast.

title: Italian Coconut Cake
directions: Cream together sugar, egg yolks and margarine.
Stir in sifted flour, buttermilk, soda and salt.
Add coconut, nuts and vanilla. Fold in beaten egg whites.
Bake in three 8-inch layer cake pans at 350° for 25 to 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A moist and fragrant Italian-American coconut cake with a tender crumb and nutty topping. The buttermilk and coconut infuse it with a subtle sweetness, perfect for celebrations.

title: Spaghetti Alla Sheila
ingredients: 1 (1 lb. 12 oz.) can Italian style peeled tomatoes (do not drain)
1/4 c. chopped, pitted, salt-cured, black olives
1 tsp. crushed dried red pepper or to taste
pinch of coarse ground black pepper
1 (2 oz.) can anchovies, drained, blotted dry and cut into small pieces
directions: Heat oil in a large skillet.
Add garlic and saute, over low heat, for 1 minute (do not brown).
Stir in tomatoes with juice, olives, capers, red pepper, oregano and black pepper.
Cook, over medium heat, stirring to break up tomatoes, until sauce thickens, about 15 minutes.
Stir in anchovies and parsley; simmer 2 minutes.
Add salt to taste.
While sauce is simmering, cook spaghetti, in plenty of boiling, salted water, for about 5 minutes; drain well.
Toss with sauce.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian pasta dish with a punchy, umami-rich sauce featuring anchovies, capers, and olives. The garlic and red pepper add a spicy kick, balancing the savoury flavours.

title: Spinach-Artichoke Dip
ingredients: 1 (14 oz.) can artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1 (10 oz.) package frozen spinach chopped and squeezed dry
directions: Combine mozzarella, sour cream, parmesan cheese and the next 6 ingredients in a large bowl stirring until well-blended.
Spoon mixture into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
Sprinkle with 1/2 cup mozzarella and 2 Tbsp. parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes until bubbly and golden brown.
Serve with the triangles and chips.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, indulgent dip from American comfort cuisine, blending rich mozzarella and parmesan with tangy sour cream and garlic. Perfect for sharing with crispy pita or tortilla chips.

title: Turkey Lasagna
ingredients: 2 c. (8 oz.) shredded Cheddar cheese (more if desired)
directions: Cook lasagna as directed on package; drain in colander. Meanwhile, blend soups, Parmesan cheese, sour cream, onion, olives and garlic salt; stir in turkey.
Spread lasagna in bottom of 13 x 9-inch pan.
Cover with 1/3 of turkey mixture topping with cheese. Repeat twice, ending with cheese.
Bake in 350° oven for 40 to 45 minutes.
Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American lasagna layered with tender turkey, creamy soups, and melted cheddar and parmesan. A comforting dish that’s perfect for family gatherings or meal prep.

title: Pizzaghetti
directions: Toss cooked and drained spaghetti with butter, garlic powder and Parmesan cheese.
Put layer of spaghetti into baking dish. Make a layer of pepperoni, layer of Mozzarella and a layer of Cheddar cheese.
Next, make a layer of spaghetti sauce, a layer of pepperoni and a layer of mushrooms.
Bake at 375° for 15 to 20 minutes.
Top with Mozzarella and Cheddar cheese.

_enrichment.description: A playful fusion of Italian and American comfort food, this dish layers spaghetti with pepperoni, mushrooms, and melted cheeses for a satisfying, cheesy bake.

title: Tuna Pasta Bake(Microwave)
directions: Place lasagna in a 12 x 7-inch glass baking dish. Cover with water and set aside.
In 1-quart glass dish, combine onion, oil and flour. Cook on High power 1 minute. Stir to dissolve flour. Stir in vegetables and milk.
Cook on High for 4 minutes, stirring once. Combine cheese, cottage cheese, egg and pepper.
Drain lasagna.
In the same dish, layer half each lasagna, vegetables, cheese and tuna.
Repeat layers and top with remaining cheese. Cover and cook on High power 15 minutes or until hot.
Let stand 10 minutes or so.

_enrichment.description: A quick and easy microwave bake from American home cooking, combining tuna, lasagna sheets, and creamy cheeses for a no-fuss, comforting meal.

title: Quick And Easy Pasta Salad(Lo-Cal Or Not)
ingredients: 16 oz. Italian salad dressing (regular or lo-cal)
directions: In colander, place veggie mix, sliced onion and mushrooms. Cook pasta until done and pour into colander over veggies.
Drain well.
Mix together with crushed garlic, salad dressing and sliced olives.
Chill well and serve.

_enrichment.description: A light and refreshing Italian-American pasta salad with tri-color pasta, frozen veggies, and tangy Italian dressing. Ideal for picnics or quick lunches.

title: Miniature Pizza Cups
directions: Cook and drain ground beef.
Stir in tomato paste, onion and seasonings.
Cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
Place biscuits in a greased muffin tin, pressing to make sure bottom and sides are covered.
Spoon 1/4 cup meat mixture into each biscuit-lined cup and then top with cheese.
Bake at 400° for 12 minutes.

_enrichment.description: Crispy Italian-inspired pizza cups packed with savoury ground beef, tangy tomato paste, and melted mozzarella. A quick and fun twist on classic pizza flavours, perfect for sharing.

title: Broccoli Shrimp Alfredo
ingredients: 1 lb. uncooked shrimp, deveined (cooked shrimp works also; shrimp need to be just warmed in olive oil)
directions: Cook fettuccine according to package directions.
Meanwhile, in a large skillet, saut the shrimp and garlic in olive oil until shrimp turn pink.
Remove and keep warm.
In the same skillet, combine the cream cheese, milk and Parmesan cheese; cook until cheeses are melted and smooth.

_enrichment.description: Creamy, indulgent fettuccine Alfredo elevated with succulent shrimp and tender broccoli florets. A rich, comforting dish that balances buttery cheese with fresh seafood.

title: Scalloped Eggplant(Makes 4 To 6 Servings)
ingredients: 1 medium size yellow onion, peeled and chopped
3 medium size fresh tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped, without juice
directions: Peel eggplants and cut into 1-inch cubes.
Bring about 1-inch of lightly salted water to boil in a 2-quart saucepan, add eggplant.
Boil for 1 minute; do not overcook.
Drain gently, squeeze out excess moisture and set aside.
Heat oil in saucepan, add onion and garlic, cook, uncovered, over moderate heat for 5 minutes or until translucent.
Combine eggplant, onion, garlic, herbs and salt.
Place mixture in buttered 2-quart shallow baking dish.
Distribute tomatoes evenly over top.
Bake, uncovered, in preheated 375° oven for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle with cheese, bake an additional 5 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Mediterranean bake featuring tender eggplant, sweet tomatoes, and melted Swiss cheese. Earthy herbs and a creamy texture make this a satisfying autumnal dish.

title: Italian Creme Cake
directions: Combine buttermilk and soda and let stand for a few minutes. Cream together sugar, margarine, and shortening.
Add egg yolks one at a time.
Add flour alternately with buttermilk mixture.
Fold in vanilla, eggs whites, pecans and coconut.
Bake at 325 degrees for approximately 25-30 in 3 greased pans.

_enrichment.description: A decadent Southern-inspired cake with moist buttermilk batter, fluffy coconut, and crunchy pecans. A showstopper dessert with a perfect balance of sweetness and texture.

title: Stuffed Turkey Mushrooms
directions: Remove the stems on the mushrooms and chop.
Heat chicken broth in skillet and cook the onion and ground turkey.
Add the chopped mushroom stems and other ingredients.
Cook this mixture about 5 minutes.
Stuff this mixture into the mushroom caps and sprinkle with the grated cheese.
Broil for 2 to 4 minutes or until the cheese melts.

_enrichment.description: Juicy turkey-stuffed mushrooms with zesty lemon pepper and herby basil notes. A light yet flavourful appetiser or side, perfect for holiday gatherings or weeknight dinners.

title: Italian Soup
ingredients: 4 (15 oz.) cans chunky Italian tomato sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients except macaroni and cheese.
Cook until zucchini is slightly tender, then add precooked macaroni (should be cooked 7 to 8 minutes).
Cook with macaroni 4 to 5 minutes.
Top with Mozzarella cheese when served.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian soup brimming with robust flavours of spiced sausage, tender vegetables, and melted mozzarella. Perfect for chilly evenings, this comforting dish blends rich umami and savoury notes.

title: Vegetable Lasagne
ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) box Ronzoni curly edge lasagne
1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
3 c. (24 oz.) part skim milk Ricotta cheese
directions: Cook lasagne according to package directions and drain. (Separate lasagne and lay out flat on wax paper or aluminum foil to keep pieces from sticking together as they cool.)
Combine Fontina cheese, vegetables, 2 1/2 cups of the Ricotta and the egg. Place layer of lasagne on bottom of a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. Spread with 1/2 of the cheese mixture.
Repeat layers, ending with lasagne. Saute onion in oil until tender.
Add flour and nutmeg. Stir in chicken broth and remaining Ricotta. Cook and stir until mixture comes to a boil. Spoon over lasagne.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes.
Uncover and broil about 2 to 3 minutes or until it is lightly browned.
Makes 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian lasagne layered with seasonal vegetables, creamy ricotta, and nutty parmesan. This dish balances earthy, herbaceous, and rich flavours for a satisfying meal.

title: Spicy Pasta And Bean Soup
ingredients: 2 1/2 c. cooked or canned white beans, drained
3/4 c. small macaroni or pasta shapes
directions: In large saucepan, saute sausage, onion, celery, carrot, garlic and red chilies about 10 minutes or until vegetables are softened.
Stir in tomatoes.
Cook and stir occasionally 10 minutes longer.
Add beans and broth; bring to slow boil.
Add macaroni and cook 15 minutes or until tender but still firm. Serve immediately with Parmesan cheese, if desired.
Makes 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A fiery Italian soup packed with spicy sausage, aromatic vegetables, and tender white beans. The blend of chilli heat and savoury broth makes this dish bold and invigorating.

title: Pizzaburgers
directions: In skillet, brown beef and cook onion until tender, but not brown.
Add tomato paste and seasonings.
Simmer, uncovered, about 15 minutes.
Spoon hot meat mixture between or over bun halves. If you like, slip onion rings and/or Mozzarella cheese into each bun.
Makes 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: A playful fusion of pizza and burger flavours, featuring juicy beef, tangy tomato paste, and melted mozzarella in a soft bun. A fun twist for casual meals or quick lunches.

title: Pizza Quiche
directions: Beat eggs and milk; add flour and spices and stir together with spoon.
Cube cheese and pepperoni; mix into batter.
Bake in greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan for approximately 35 minutes in 425° oven.
Cut into squares for serving.

_enrichment.description: A savoury Italian-American quiche packed with pepperoni, three cheeses, and a fluffy egg base. Ideal for brunch or a hearty snack, offering a rich and satisfying bite.

title: Sauteed Mushrooms With Pasta
ingredients: pinch of chopped parsley or scallions
directions: Rinse, drain and slice mushrooms thickly.
Heat large pan and then add olive oil.
Add pressed or chopped garlic to hot oil and (before garlic starts to brown) add mushrooms and stir.
Let cook for 5 to 8 minutes, until tender.
Splash with sherry and stir for another minute or so.
Spoon onto cooked pasta (fettucini works well) and garnish with Parmesan cheese and chopped parsley or scallions.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian dish where earthy mushrooms meet delicate pasta in a garlicky, umami-rich sauce. Simple yet deeply flavourful, this dish highlights the natural taste of fresh mushrooms with a splash of sherry for depth.

title: Cheesy Vegetable Pizza
ingredients: 1 envelope Lipton vegetable recipe soup mix
directions: Preheat oven to 425°.
Onto lightly oiled pizza pan, press dough to form crust.
In a small bowl, blend soup mix, oil, basil, garlic and pepper.
Spread evenly on dough. Top with remaining ingredients. Bake 20 minutes until crust is golden brown. Cut into wedges.

_enrichment.description: A hearty British-inspired pizza loaded with melted mozzarella, fresh tomatoes, and earthy mushrooms. The vegetable soup mix adds a savoury depth, making this a crowd-pleasing dish for any occasion.

title: Meatballs And Spaghetti
ingredients: 1 large can whole tomatoes, drain juice off and save
directions: Mix hamburger, bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, juice of tomatoes, egg, 1/2 teaspoon oregano and seasoning salt.
Scoop up a tablespoon of meat mixture into balls and brown in skillet.
Mix tomato sauce, cut up the whole tomatoes, diced up celery, 1/2 teaspoon seasoning salt, 1/8 tsp.
oregano, 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder and 1/8 teaspoon Italian seasoning and simmer.
When meatballs are browned, drain on paper towel, then mix into sauce and simmer for about 20 minutes.
Boil water and prepare noodles. Serve meatballs over noodles.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American classic featuring tender meatballs simmered in a rich tomato sauce, served over al dente noodles. The blend of herbs and Parmesan cheese creates a deeply satisfying meal.

title: Chicken Italian Supreme
ingredients: 1 Tbsp. low calorie Italian salad dressing
directions: Bake 2 large chicken breasts; remove skin and bone.
Put in deep pan with tomatoes, tomato juice, mushrooms and Sweet 'N Low. Add salad dressing; sprinkle with the oregano, paprika, onion flakes, parsley flakes, salt and pepper.
Put foil on top of pan. Bake at 400° for 1 1/2 hours.
Makes 3 to 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American baked chicken dish with juicy tomatoes, mushrooms, and a hint of paprika. The slow baking process infuses the chicken with rich, savoury flavours, perfect for a family dinner.

title: Tortellini Alfredo Soup
ingredients: 76 oz. Stouffer's fettucini alfredo sauce, thawed
2 c. Stouffer's cheese tortellini in egg pasta
2 c. Stouffer's cheese tortellini in spinach pasta
directions: Place fettucini sauce in a heavy stockpot; add milk, onions, red peppers, carrots, broccoli and black pepper; stir well to combine.
Heat to 160° or until the vegetables are tender; stir frequently.
Stir in the tortellini.
Hold at 160° for service. Garnish with Parmesan cheese.
Yield:
20 to 22 (8 ounce) servings.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, comforting soup blending tortellini with tender vegetables in a rich Alfredo-style broth. Perfect for a quick yet satisfying meal, this dish is a crowd-pleaser with its velvety texture and indulgent flavours.

title: Hot Pasta Salad
directions: Cook twist pasta according to box directions.
Drain and rinse both kinds of beans and add to the pasta.
Cook broccoli just until tender and drain before adding to the pasta.
Add remaining ingredients and simmer to heat through before serving.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-inspired pasta salad bursting with tender pasta, kidney beans, and garbanzos, tossed in a savoury sauce with a touch of sweetness from pimentos. Perfect for picnics or quick lunches.

title: Spaghetti Primavera
directions: Melt butter in medium frypan.
Saute mushrooms, green pepper, onion and garlic until tender.
Add broccoli, tomato, parsley and oregano to pan; heat through, stirring occasionally.
Spoon vegetable mixture over spaghetti; toss well to coat.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle each serving with Parmesan cheese. Makes 4 servings.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian primavera dish featuring al dente spaghetti tossed with fresh vegetables, herbs, and a light tomato sauce. A celebration of spring flavours, best enjoyed with a sprinkle of Parmesan.

title: Low Fat Chicken Casserole
ingredients: 12 oz. bag fine egg noodles, cooked and drained
4 chicken breasts, cooked, boned and skinned
directions: In large bowl combine chicken and spaghetti sauce.
In separate bowl combine ricotta cheese, egg whites, and parmesan cheese.
Spray 9 x 13 inch pan with nonfat cooking spray.
Spread 1/2 of chicken/sauce mixture in pans.
Top 1/2 mixture of ricotta cheese.
Place 1/2 the noodles on top of this and repeat layers. Top with mozzarella cheese.
Bake at 350° for 30-40 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American casserole layered with egg noodles, tender chicken, and a creamy ricotta-parmesan blend, baked to golden perfection. A lighter take on a classic comfort dish.

title: Pizza Fritte(Fried Bits Of Dough)
directions: Peel, boil and mash the potatoes.
Save the liquid and add it to the flour.
Mix all ingredients together well and set in warm place to rise until double in bulk.
When dough has raised sufficiently, pinch off small pieces and fry
in oil in deep fryer. Drain and sprinkle with sugar.

_enrichment.description: A Neapolitan street food classic—crispy fried dough balls dusted with sugar and cinnamon, made from mashed potatoes and flour. A sweet, indulgent treat perfect for festivals or dessert cravings.

title: Fettuccine With Shrimp And Spinach
ingredients: 1 lb. medium-size fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined
directions: Combine the first 8 ingredients in a medium bowl; stir well. Set aside.
Bring 1 quart water to a boil in a large saucepan; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes.
Drain well; rinse with water and drain again.
Set shrimp aside.
Cook fettuccine in a Dutch oven according to package directions, omitting salt and fat; drain. Immediately return fettuccine to pan; add spinach and stir mixture well to combine.
Cover and let stand 1 to 2 minutes or until spinach wilts.
Add Ricotta mixture and shrimp, stirring well to combine.
Serve immediately.

_enrichment.description: A light yet satisfying Italian dish of fettuccine tossed with succulent shrimp, fresh spinach, and a creamy ricotta-yogurt sauce. A balance of rich and fresh flavours, ideal for a quick yet elegant meal.

title: Fresh Tomato Pizza
ingredients: 1 Tbsp. chopped, fresh basil or 1 tsp. dried basil
directions: Place tomato slices in a circle on crust, overlapping slightly, until crust is completely covered.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Cover with olives, if desired, green pepper and onion. Sprinkle seasonings over all.
Cover with cheese.
Bake at 400° for 15 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Serve immediately. Yields 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian classic where ripe tomatoes take centre stage on a crispy crust, drizzled with golden olive oil and melted cheeses. Bursting with fresh basil, oregano, and a medley of olives and peppers, this pizza is a celebration of summer flavours.

title: Italian Chicken With Spaghetti
directions: Mix together sauce, soup, paste, milk and spices.
Pour over cut up chicken.
Bake at 375° for 1 hour covered.
Take out and place cheeses (Parmesan first) on top of chicken and sauce. Cover; cook 10 minutes more.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American dish where tender chicken simmers in a creamy tomato sauce infused with garlic and herbs, then crowned with melted cheeses. Comforting and rich, it’s perfect for a cosy family dinner.

title: Hearts Of Romaine Salad
directions: Remove dark green outer leaves and discard.
Tear remaining leaves into quarter pieces; rinse and dry.
Add into food processor the basil, shallots, vinegar and mustard and process briefly (three or four short bursts).
Add oil and cheese and process in two short bursts, just to combine.
Divide romaine hearts among four chilled plates and drizzle dressing over. Garnish with basil sprigs and toasted pine nuts.

_enrichment.description: A crisp, refreshing salad from the heart of Italy, featuring tender romaine hearts bathed in a creamy, tangy Parmesan dressing. Brightened with fresh basil and a hint of shallot, it’s a light yet satisfying starter.

title: Italian Meat Pie
ingredients: 10 oz. pkg. frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
2 (16 oz.) cans baby tomatoes, drained and sliced
directions: Combine meats, oats, tomato sauce, egg, seasonings and 1/2 of the Parmesan cheese.
Pack into bottom and halfway up the sides of an ungreased 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
Bake at 350° for 25 minutes; drain fat.
Top meat with spinach.
Arrange tomatoes over spinach. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
Top with Mozzarella. Bake at 350° for 15 minutes more or until cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Yields approximately 10 servings.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian meat pie packed with ground beef, pork sausage, and spinach, all nestled in a savoury tomato sauce and topped with gooey mozzarella. A comforting dish with layers of flavour and texture.

title: No Cook Noodle Lasagna
directions: Brown beef; add spaghetti sauce; stir well.
In another bowl, mix eggs, add cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese and 1 cup Mozzarella cheese.
In 9 x 13-inch pan, place 3 uncooked noodles, alternate meat mixture, cheese mixture and noodles.
Repeat, ending with meat on top.
Pour hot water around edge of pan.
Cover with foil. Bake 1 to 1 1/2 hours at 350°.
Remove from oven, sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
Let cool 10 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A no-fuss Italian-American twist on lasagna, layered with uncooked noodles, spiced beef, and a creamy cottage cheese mixture. Baked until bubbly, it’s a foolproof dish for busy weeknights.

title: Broiled Salmon In Herb Sauce
directions: Combine butter, spices and chopped garlic and heat slowly until butter is melted.
Let stand for 15 minutes.
Sprinkle fillets with salt and place on greased broiler pan.
Brush with butter sauce.
Broil 3 inches from heat source 4 to 6 minutes on each side, basting several times.

_enrichment.description: A succulent French-inspired salmon dish bathed in a fragrant herb butter sauce, blending aromatic thyme, sage, and oregano with a hint of garlic. Perfect for a light yet flavourful dinner.

title: Lasagna Recipe
directions: Brown in skillet, ground beef, olive oil, parsley, onion and garlic.
Add tomato paste, water, salt and pepper; simmer for 1/2 hour or more.
Add lasagna noodles to 6 quarts of salted, boiling water; cook for 15 to 30 minutes, stirring constantly.
Drain. Mix eggs and Ricotta cheese.
Arrange in a baking dish with lasagna first, meat sauce, Mozzarella cheese and cottage cheese. Bake at 375° for 20 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian classic layered with rich meat sauce, creamy ricotta, and melted mozzarella, baked to golden perfection. A comforting dish that’s a crowd-pleaser for any occasion.

title: Monica'S Pizza
ingredients: 2 c. all-purpose flour (crescent bread flour is great)
directions: Place all ingredients in bread pan of bread machine.
Select manual and press start or mix and knead yourself.
When the machine beeps, turn off the bread machine.
Remove bread pan and turn out dough onto a floured countertop or cutting board.
Form dough into a mound and allow it to rest for 10 minutes.
Grease one 14-inch pizza pan.
With your hands, gently stretch and press dough to fit evenly into pan.
Pinch dough around the edge to form a small rim.
Bake at 350° for 15 to 20 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A simple yet delicious homemade pizza with a soft, pillowy crust infused with garlic and oregano. A quick and satisfying meal for any day of the week.

title: Sausage Bread Loaf
directions: Cut loaves in half and allow to rise.
Brown ground meat and remove excess grease.
Cut sausage into 1/8-inch slices. Brown and also drain. Grate the cheeses.
Cut onion tops.
Allow meat to cool.
Each ingredient should be in separate bowls.
Roll out dough very thin and round. Spread butter generously over dough. In center, add each ingredient in layers. Roll into loaf. Bake at 350° until brown.
Makes 6 loaves.

_enrichment.description: A savoury Italian-inspired bread loaf stuffed with spiced sausage, melted cheeses, and earthy mushrooms. A festive centrepiece for sharing with loved ones.

title: Italian Bean Bake
ingredients: 2 (16 oz.) cans cut Italian green beans
directions: Combine drained beans, tomato sauce, mustard, dried onion, garlic salt and pepper.
Turn mixture into one-quart casserole. Cover and bake in a 350° oven for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle cheese on top.
Bake uncovered 1 to 2 minutes more or until cheese is melted.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian bean bake with tender green beans in a tangy tomato sauce, topped with melted provolone for a comforting side dish. Ideal for a cosy family meal.

title: Sherwood'S Shrimp Marinara
ingredients: 1 (1 lb. 13 oz.) can tomatoes, sieved and pureed
directions: Shell, wash and drain the shrimp.
In a large skillet, heat the oil and saute gently over medium-high heat for 5 minutes.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and keep warm.
Add the garlic and saute until golden.
Stir in the tomatoes, salt, oregano, parsley, pepper and wine.
Cook rapidly, uncovered, for 15 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
If the sauce becomes too thick, add 1/4 to 1/2 cup water.
Add the shrimp and reheat gently. Meanwhile, cook the rice.
Serve immediately with the shrimp sauce. Makes 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-American classic from the heart of the Mediterranean, this shrimp marinara bursts with the rich, tangy flavours of ripe tomatoes, garlic, and a splash of red wine. Fresh parsley and oregano add a fragrant finish to this comforting dish.

title: Spaghetti With Bacon And Tomatoes
ingredients: 4 large ripe tomatoes (cored, peeled and chopped)
directions: In medium saucepan, heat oil add garlic and saute for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes, olives and seasonings.
Saute 4-5 minutes. Add water and heat 10 minutes.
Put spaghetti on plate, top with cheese then tomato mixture and finish with crumbled bacon.
Serve immediately.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian dish where crispy bacon meets juicy tomatoes and briny olives, all tossed with al dente spaghetti and melted mozzarella. The garlic and herbs infuse every bite with a comforting, aromatic warmth.

title: Spaghetti And Chicken
directions: Bring pot of salted water to boil; cook spaghetti until tender, 8 to 10 minutes.
While spaghetti is cooking, make sauce. Put oil, garlic and onions in a skillet over medium-high heat. Saute until onion is soft but not browned.
Add chicken meat; cook 3 to 4 minutes, stirring often.
Add tomatoes, olives and chicken broth.
Simmer for 3 minutes; add basil.
Drain spaghetti; return to pot.
Toss with chicken mixture.
Serves 4.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American fusion of tender chicken, al dente spaghetti, and a medley of tomatoes and olives in a savoury broth. Fresh basil brightens the dish, making it a satisfying one-pot meal.

title: Lasagna Rolls
ingredients: 1/2 lb. lasagna noodles, cooked and drained
directions: Combine hamburger, mushrooms, pepper, V-8, oregano, pepper and cornstarch.
Cook until vegetables are tender and sauce thickens, stirring constantly 5 minutes or more.
Layer this mixture, then 1/3 cup of cheeses and eggs mixed on each noodle and roll up. Place in 13 x 9-inch pan and add 1 cup of sauce on bottom and put rolls in, then top with remaining sauce.
Bake at 375° for 30 minutes.
Add Parmesan cheese on top and bake 5 minutes more.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American twist on lasagna, these rolls are stuffed with a rich beef and mushroom filling, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella. Baked to golden perfection, they’re a crowd-pleasing centrepiece.

title: Sunflower Pasta Salad
ingredients: 4 oz. bow tie or twist pasta
1 Tbsp. sunflower, olive or safflower oil
fresh ground black or white pepper to taste
1 c. cherry tomatoes or tomato wedges
2 Tbsp. dry roasted, unsalted sunflower seeds
1 Tbsp. fresh or 1 tsp. dried herb combination (your favorite)
directions: Cook the pasta according to the package directions, without the salt.
Meanwhile, combine the lemon juice, oil, garlic, salt and pepper in a jar.
Cover and shake.
Combine all other ingredients, including the cooked, drained pasta in a large bowl. Add the dressing and toss.
Refrigerate, covered for at least 1 hour before serving.
Yield:
2 servings (as a main course).

_enrichment.description: A refreshing Italian-inspired pasta salad with sunflower seeds, cherry tomatoes, and crisp cucumber, all tossed in a zesty lemon-garlic dressing. Perfect for picnics or light summer meals.

title: Italian Zucchini Crescent Pie
ingredients: 8 oz. (2 c.) shredded natural Mozzarella cheese
8 oz. can refrigerated quick crescent dinner rolls
2 tsp. Dijon or pure prepared mustard
directions: Heat oven to 375°.
In 10-inch skillet, cook zucchini and onion in margarine until tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in parsley and seasonings.
In large bowl, blend eggs and cheese. Stir in vegetable mixture.

_enrichment.description: A delightful Italian savoury pie where tender zucchini and aromatic herbs meet melted mozzarella in a flaky pastry crust. Bursting with fresh basil and oregano, this dish is a celebration of Mediterranean flavours.

title: Miniature Pizzas (Microwave)
ingredients: 2 English muffins, split and crisply toasted
directions: Mix catsup, oregano, vinegar, onion powder, sugar and pepper. Spread 1/4 on each muffin half.
Top with 1/4 of the pepperoni. Place 1 tablespoon of Mozzarella on each muffin half.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.

Place on single layer of paper toweling on carousel or on double layer of paper toweling on dinner plate. Microwave on High (100%) until cheese is melted and filling is heated through, 1 minute to 2 minutes and 15 seconds.
If using oven other than carousel, rotate plate and rearrange muffins after half the cooking time.
Cut each muffin half into 4 wedges. Yields 16 appetizers.

_enrichment.description: Quick and fun Italian-inspired mini pizzas with a tangy tomato base, melted mozzarella, and a sprinkle of Parmesan. Perfect for a casual snack or appetizer with bold, zesty flavours.

title: Grilled Chicken Pizza
ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) can Ro-Tel tomatoes and chilies
directions: Spray both sides of each tortilla with Pam; place on baking sheet.
Broil each side until lightly toasted.
Preheat oven to 350°.
In a medium bowl, combine refried beans and Ro-Tel tomatoes; spread 1/4 cup over 5 tortillas.
Top with 2 tablespoons chicken, 1/4 cup cheese and other tortillas.
Repeat layering, ending with cheese.
Bake in preheated oven 20 minutes. Top with lettuce, bell peppers and onion.
Makes 5 pizzas.

_enrichment.description: A Tex-Mex twist on pizza featuring grilled chicken, spicy Ro-Tel tomatoes, and melted cheddar on crispy flour tortillas. Topped with fresh lettuce and crunchy vegetables for a vibrant, satisfying meal.

title: Five Cheese Chicken
ingredients: 1/4 to 1/3 c. fine dry bread crumbs
directions: Place the 4 chicken breast halves between pieces of plastic wrap and flatten with mallet from center out to form thin cutlets. On each cutlet, place a slice of Mozzarella and Swiss cheese. Mix Ricotta and Parmesan cheeses with egg yolk.
Divide among cutlets, placing a spoonful at wide end of each cutlet.
Roll up cutlets from wide end.
Roll each in flour; dip in egg and coat with crumbs.
Secure with toothpicks.
Brown chicken in oil and butter.
Bake at 350° for 20 minutes.
Sprinkle with parsley.

_enrichment.description: Elegant Swiss and ricotta-stuffed chicken cutlets rolled in breadcrumbs and pan-fried to golden perfection. A rich, creamy centre with a crispy exterior, inspired by classic Italian techniques.

title: Biscuit Tortoni(An Italian Dessert)
directions: Soak crumbs in milk with powdered sugar and salt for 1/2 hour. Fold whipped cream and vanilla into softened macaroons.
Fill paper baking cups in cupcake tins.
Decorate with maraschino cherry bits.
Freeze without stirring.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian frozen dessert with layers of whipped cream, vanilla, and macaroon crumbs, topped with maraschino cherries. Light, airy, and subtly sweet—a perfect end to any meal.

title: Candy Pizza
ingredients: 1 (12 oz.) pkg. Hershey milk chocolate chips
directions: Heat chocolate chips and condensed milk in microwave until melted.
Pour over 1 cup Rice Krispies and stir to coat.
Press on buttered pizza pan.
Press into top the candied cherries and nuts. Drizzle melted almond bark across top or can use part of white frosting mixed with Eagle Brand.

_enrichment.description: A playful twist on classic desserts, this Candy Pizza from American cuisine blends melted chocolate, crispy Rice Krispies, and a medley of candied cherries and nuts for a sweet, crunchy treat. Perfect for sharing at parties or as a fun family snack.

title: Easy Cheese Lasagna
ingredients: 2 c. (1 lb.) Ricotta cheese or cottage cheese (1 large)
directions: Heat oven to 375°.
In 10-inch skillet, brown ground beef, onion and garlic and drain.
Return beef mixture to skillet and stir in Ragu and water.

In 13 x 9-inch baking dish, layer 1/3 sauce mixture, 1/2 of uncooked lasagna noodles, 1/2 of combined Ricotta or cottage cheese and 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese and parsley. Repeat these steps in layers, ending with sauce on top. (Everything will be 1/2, except sauce and it will be thirds in order to end up with enough to cover the top lightly.)
(I add Monterey Jack cheese to mine, optional.)
Cook for 1 hour tightly covered with aluminum foil.
Let set 10 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American classic, this Easy Cheese Lasagna layers rich tomato sauce, creamy ricotta, and melted mozzarella between al dente noodles. Hearty and satisfying, it’s ideal for family dinners or meal prep.

title: Pasta Primavera With Shrimp
ingredients: 5 c. broccoli flowerets, cooked and drained
directions: Cook fettucine in salted water to desired doneness.
Drain and rinse with hot water.
In large skillet melt margarine; saute onion and garlic until tender.
Add shrimp and saute 2 to 3 minutes. Remove shrimp from skillet; keep warm.
Add 2 tablespoons margarine and whipping cream to skillet; heat until margarine melts.
Stir in cheese, salt and pepper.
In large saucepan combine fettucine, broccoli, and cream mixture; cook until thoroughly heated.
Place on warm serving platter; spoon shrimp over top.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: This vibrant Pasta Primavera with Shrimp from Italian cuisine bursts with fresh broccoli, tender shrimp, and a silky Parmesan cream sauce. Light yet indulgent, it’s perfect for a summer dinner or a quick yet elegant meal.

title: Spicy Oven Fries
directions: Wash potatoes; cut into wedges or 3/4-inch chunk slices. Drain.
Place in a bowl; sprinkle with oil and toss lightly. Combine spices and cheese.
In a separate bowl, put half of the potatoes in.
Sprinkle half of the spice mixture over and toss lightly.
After placing these potatoes in a single layer on a lightly oiled 10 x 15-inch pan, sprinkle spices over the remaining potatoes.
Bake at 425° to 450° for 25 to 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: Crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside, these Spicy Oven Fries from American cuisine are tossed in a zesty blend of oregano, chili powder, and Parmesan. A crowd-pleasing side dish for BBQs or a simple weeknight meal.

title: Artie'S Homemade Pasta Sauce
ingredients: 2 lb. ground beef or meatballs and/or sweet sausage
directions: Chop the onions, bell peppers, parsley, mushrooms and garlic. In a large pot over medium heat, heat the olive oil and saute onions and peppers until onions are clear.
Add mushrooms, then garlic and parsley.
Add ground beef and brown it off.
Add tomato sauce, oregano and salt.
Then add ketchup and lemon juice.
Bring to slow boil and add wine.
Bring to boil again, then reduce heat to simmer and cover and cook 2 or 3 hours.
For pasta sauce, add meatballs and sausage during last hour of cooking.

_enrichment.description: A hearty and flavourful Italian-American pasta sauce, Artie’s Homemade Pasta Sauce simmers ground beef, mushrooms, and bell peppers in a rich tomato base with a hint of red wine and lemon. Ideal for slow-cooked comfort or meal prep.

title: Pasta-Bean Salad
ingredients: 1 (16 oz.) can kidney beans, well drained
1 c. frozen peas, thawed and drained
directions: Cook the pasta (macaroni, twists or shells) and drain.
In large bowl, stir together mayonnaise, parsley, cheese and lemon juice until blended.
Add pasta, beans, peas and carrots; toss to coat well.
Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.

_enrichment.description: A creamy Italian-inspired pasta salad bursting with tender macaroni, kidney beans, and sweet peas, all coated in a zesty lemon-parsley dressing. The rich umami of Parmesan and the freshness of herbs make this a vibrant, summery dish.

title: Peasant Potatoes
ingredients: 1/2 lb. smoked beef sausage, cut into 3/4 inch slices
6 medium potatoes, cut into 1-1/2 to 2 inch pieces
2 c. sliced Savoy or other cabbage
1 c. diced or sliced roasted red bell peppers
directions: In a large skillet over medium heat, melt butter.
Add onion and garlic.
Cook and stir 5 minutes or until onion is transparent. Stir in oregano and sausage and cook about 5 minutes more.
Stir in potatoes, salt and pepper until potatoes are well coated with butter.
Place mixture in slow cooker.
Cover and cook on High 3 to 4 hours or on low for 6 to 8 hours, stirring every hour if possible.
During last 30 minutes of cooking, add cabbage and peppers.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
Makes 6 side dish servings or 4 main dish servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty French-inspired one-pot dish of buttery potatoes, savoy cabbage, and smoky sausage, slow-cooked to tender perfection. The earthy oregano and nutty Parmesan add depth, making it a comforting winter meal.

title: Italian Meatballs In Spaghetti Sauce
directions: Pour water over bread crumbs, then mix all ingredients together.
Form into 1 1/2-inch meatballs.
Heat a little oil in a skillet; brown meatballs, a dozen or so at a time.
Place them in spaghetti sauce after draining off grease.

_enrichment.description: Classic Italian meatballs simmered in a fragrant tomato sauce, with a blend of beef, sausage, and herbs. The tender, juicy meatballs and rich, herbaceous sauce make this a beloved family dinner.

title: Vermicelli With Spinach And Pasta Sauce
directions: Cook spinach in olive oil over medium heat about 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add salt, pepper, Ricotta and skim milk. Cook over low heat until mixture is heated through.
Do not allow to boil.
Simmer pasta in sauce in a small pan; heat through. Cook vermicelli according to package; drain.

_enrichment.description: A light yet satisfying Italian dish of vermicelli tossed with wilted spinach, creamy ricotta, and a smooth tomato sauce. The silky ricotta and tender pasta create a comforting, herb-infused meal.

title: Whole Wheat Lasagna
ingredients: 2 large boxes lasagna noodles (preferably whole wheat)
1 1/2 to 2 pt. small curd cottage cheese
4 large pkg. Mozzarella cheese strips or shredded
directions: Brown beef and onion in large saucepan; drain grease.
Salt and pepper to taste and add all spices (sugar, garlic powder and Italian seasoning).
Add tomato wedges, tomato paste and 1 can water.
Simmer 30 minutes.
Boil noodles according to box; don't over boil.
Drain.

Make layers starting with 1 thin layer of sauce, 4 noodles laid lengthwise, layer of sauce, layer of cottage cheese, layer of Mozzarella cheese, noodles, sauce, cottage cheese, Mozzarella, sauce, noodles, sauce, cottage cheese, Mozzarella and last 2 or 3 tablespoons Parmesan.
Bake at 350° until cheese really bubbles, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Serve with tossed salad and garlic bread!

_enrichment.description: A wholesome Italian lasagna layered with lean beef, cottage cheese, and mozzarella, baked in a rich tomato sauce. The flaky noodles and gooey cheese make this a decadent yet nourishing dish.

title: Wild Rice And Mushroom Frittata
directions: In small bowl, rinse rice in several changes of cold water; drain in strainer; set aside.
In 1 quart saucepan, combine rice, water and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
Heat to boiling over high heat; cover and reduce heat to low.
Cook rice until tender, about 40 minutes.
Drain well.
Heat oven to 350°.
In 9-inch skillet with heat proof handle, heat oil over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic and mushrooms.
Cook, stirring, until vegetables brown and most of the liquid evaporates, about 5 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-inspired frittata brimming with wild rice, earthy mushrooms, and fresh herbs, offering a rich umami depth balanced by the brightness of basil and parsley.

title: Chicken Parmigiana
ingredients: 3 whole chicken breasts, split, boned and skinned
8 oz. Mozzarella cheese, thinly sliced and cut into triangles
directions: Place each chicken breast on a sheet of waxed paper.
Flatten to 1/4-inch thickness, using a meat mallet or rolling pin. Combine eggs, salt and pepper. Dip chicken breasts into egg mixture and roll each in bread crumbs.
Brown chicken in hot oil in a large skillet.
Drain on paper towels.

Place chicken in a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish. Drain oil from skillet. Combine tomato sauce, basil and garlic powder in skillet. Bring to a boil and simmer 10 minutes or until thickened.
Stir in butter. Pour mixture over chicken.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Cover and bake at 350° for 30 minutes.
Uncover and arrange Mozzarella cheese slices on top. Bake 10 additional minutes.
Yields 6 servings.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian dish featuring crispy breaded chicken topped with tangy tomato sauce, melted mozzarella, and nutty Parmesan, delivering a perfect balance of rich and savoury flavours.

title: Easy Lasagna Ii
ingredients: 1 large carton small curd cottage cheese
directions: Grease a 9 x 13 x 2-inch baking pan.
Combine meat and spaghetti sauce.
Mix eggs into cottage cheese.
Spread a thin layer of sauce in pan.
Add a layer of the uncooked lasagne noodles, a layer of the cottage cheese mixture, a layer of cut up Mozzarella and a generous layer of sauce.
Repeat layers, ending with the sauce.
Cover tightly with heavy-duty foil and bake at 375° for 1 hour.
Let stand, covered, outside of oven for 12 to 20 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle with Parmesan before serving.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian-American lasagna layered with seasoned beef, creamy cottage cheese, and melted mozzarella, offering a rich and hearty meal with a perfect balance of textures.

title: Pizza Omelet(Serves 2)
directions: Allow 3 eggs for 2 servings.
For each egg, add 1 tablespoon evaporated milk, 1/8 teaspoon salt and pepper.
Beat eggs slightly; beat in milk and seasonings.
Heat 1 tablespoon butter in heavy skillet and add eggs and cook slowly.

_enrichment.description: A quick and flavourful Italian-American omelette packed with sautéed onions, peppers, and melted mozzarella, delivering a savoury and slightly tangy taste with a fluffy texture.

title: Spaghetti With Zucchini Sauce*
ingredients: 2 Tbsp. Ricotta cheese, at room temperature
directions: Wash, but do not peel zucchini.
Trim ends and slice lengthwise into quarters and then into 1/2-inch slices.
Heat oil and 2 tablespoons margarine.
Add garlic and zucchini.
Cook until zucchini is golden brown; drain on paper towels.
Discard garlic. Season zucchini with salt and pepper.
Boil spaghetti and drain. Place in warmed serving bowl with remaining 2 tablespoons margarine, Ricotta cheese and generous amount of grated cheese. Salt and pepper to taste.
Toss well and serve with zucchini slices on top.

_enrichment.description: A light yet satisfying Italian dish featuring al dente spaghetti tossed with golden zucchini slices and creamy ricotta, offering a delicate balance of fresh and savoury flavours.

title: Three Cheese And Chicken Bake
ingredients: 8 oz. wide or lasagna noodles, cooked
2 cans condensed cream of chicken soup
directions: Saute the green pepper and onion in butter. Stir in soup, milk, mushrooms, pimento and basil.
Place half the noodles in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish. Cover with 1/2 each mushroom sauce, cottage cheese, chicken and cheeses.
Repeat.
Bake at 350° for 45 minutes.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American bake layered with lasagna noodles, tender chicken, and a trio of cheeses, all smothered in a creamy mushroom sauce. Rich, savoury, and comforting, this dish is perfect for a cosy family dinner.

title: Minestrone Soup With Ground Beef
ingredients: 1/4 small head green cabbage, thinly sliced
directions: In a 5-quart Dutch oven or saucepot over high heat, cook ground beef, onion, celery and cabbage, stirring carefully so that meat stays in chunks, until all pan juices evaporate and meat and vegetables are lightly browned (about 10 minutes).
Add tomatoes, garbanzo beans and corn with all their liquid, zucchini, macaroni, bouillon, basil leaves and water.
Over high heat, heat to boiling, stirring to break up tomatoes.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 8 to 10 minutes, until macaroni and vegetables are tender.

_enrichment.description: A robust Italian soup brimming with ground beef, seasonal vegetables, and garbanzo beans in a tomato-based broth. Hearty and tangy, it’s a classic one-pot dish for chilly evenings or a satisfying lunch.

title: Broccoli With Rigatoni Pasta
ingredients: 1 large bunch fresh broccoli, cut into florets
directions: Gently brown garlic in oil and butter.
Be careful not to burn garlic or it will taste bitter.
Add broccoli and stir as you heat pan.
Add chicken broth; cover and simmer until broccoli is just al dente (still a little firm).
Cook rigatoni pasta until al dente; drain.
Add half the fresh basil and mix together with the broccoli.
Top with parsley, pepper, cheese and basil.

_enrichment.description: A light yet satisfying Italian dish featuring al dente rigatoni tossed with tender broccoli in a garlicky broth, finished with fresh basil and grated cheese. Fresh, herbaceous, and subtly creamy, it’s ideal for a quick weeknight meal.

title: Italian Cream Pound Cake
directions: Cream together sugar, margarine and shortening.
Add egg yolks, one at a time, beating after each one.
Mix together soda and buttermilk; add alternately with flour to first mixture.
Add nuts, coconut and vanilla.
Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into mixture.

_enrichment.description: A decadent Southern-inspired pound cake infused with coconut and pecans, boasting a moist, tender crumb and a hint of vanilla. Sweet, rich, and nutty, it’s a showstopper for celebrations or afternoon tea.

title: Healthy Lasagne
ingredients: 1 (32 oz.) jar Healthy Choice Italian sauce
1 (8 oz.) container low moisture part skim milk Mozzarella cheese, grated
directions: In saucepan, cook turkey.
Add garlic powder, oregano and basil.
When cooked, add Italian sauce.
In bowl, mix the cottage cheese, egg whites, pepper and parsley flakes.
Layer 3 noodles (uncooked) in bottom of 13 x 9-inch dish, then the meat sauce, cottage cheese mixture and evenly sprinkle Mozzarella.
Repeat. Bake at 375° for about 35 to 40 minutes.
Add some water (1/4 to 1/2 cup) during baking if too dry.
Let stand 10 to 15 minutes. Serve.

_enrichment.description: A lighter take on lasagne, packed with lean ground turkey, fresh herbs, and a creamy cottage cheese layer, all topped with melted mozzarella. Fresh, herbaceous, and balanced, it’s a guilt-free twist on a classic.

title: Italian Spaghetti Pie
directions: Preheat oven to 350°.
Grease 10-inch pie pan or 9-inch square pan.
Cook spaghetti to desired tenderness; drain and set aside. Brown the beef with celery; drain.
Stir in spaghetti sauce and mushrooms; simmer 15 minutes.
Combine spaghetti, eggs, Parmesan cheese and garlic salt; toss.
Place mixture in the prepared pan. Press evenly over bottom and up sides, forming a crust.
Pour meat mixture over spaghetti.
Sprinkle remaining Parmesan cheese.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian twist on a classic pie, blending al dente spaghetti with rich ground beef, mushrooms, and tangy tomato sauce. The dish is finished with a crispy Parmesan crust and a touch of garlic salt for depth.

title: Shrimp Linguine
ingredients: 1 lb. medium shrimp, shelled and deveined
directions: In large skillet, combine shrimp, wine, lemon juice and lime juice.
Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat; simmer, covered, 3 minutes. Add remaining ingredients, except linguine.
Cook, stirring constantly, just until snow peas are tender and shrimp is opaque, about 5 minutes.
Prepare linguine as package directs.
Remove bay leaf from shrimp mixture.
Combine shrimp mixture and hot cooked linguine; toss to coat.
Refrigerate leftovers.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-inspired linguine dish featuring succulent shrimp in a zesty white wine and citrus sauce, tossed with fresh snow peas and aromatic herbs. Perfect for a light yet elegant summer meal.

title: Tuna Pasta Bake
ingredients: 1 can tuna in water, drained and flaked
directions: In small saucepan over medium-high heat, heat oil.
Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes.
Add tomato sauce and oregano; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer, stirring occasionally about 15 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A comforting British-inspired pasta bake where flaky tuna meets creamy cottage cheese and sweet peas in a tomato-oregano sauce. A simple yet satisfying dish for any season.

title: Mexitalian Lasagna
directions: Heat oven to 350°.
In large bowl, combine chili, drained salsa, mushrooms, Parmesan cheese and Italian seasoning.
In small bowl, stir cottage cheese and parsley flakes.
Layer noodles, cottage cheese, chili mixture and Mozzarella cheese in a 9 x 9-inch baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray; repeat to make three layers.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lasagna is thoroughly heated.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A bold fusion of Mexican and Italian flavours, this lasagna layers spicy chili, salsa, and melted mozzarella over classic noodles. A crowd-pleasing dish for festive gatherings or cosy dinners.

title: Hot And Spicy Shrimp
directions: Mix butter and oil in flame-proof baking dish.
Add all spices and lemon juice.
Bring to a boil, then decrease heat and simmer 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
Remove from heat and let the flavors marry for 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A fiery Mediterranean-inspired shrimp dish bathed in a fragrant blend of butter, herbs, and spices, finished with a squeeze of lemon. Ideal for a quick yet impressive meal.

title: Beef Casserole Italiano
ingredients: 2 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained well
directions: Brown ground beef and onion; drain off fat.

Stir in the tomato sauce, parsley, oregano, basil, 1/4 teaspoon salt and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes stirring occasionally. Meanwhile, combine spinach, Ricotta cheese and remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt.
Spoon spinach mixture around edges of 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
Pour beef mixture into center.
Cut each Mozzarella slice into 3 strips and arrange in a lattice pattern over meat.
Bake at 375° for 20 minutes.
Yields 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian casserole where tender ground beef meets aromatic herbs and creamy ricotta, all topped with melted mozzarella for a comforting, cheesy delight. Rich tomato sauce and fresh parsley bring vibrant Mediterranean flavours.

title: Cabbage Lasagna
directions: Saute ground turkey, onion, and green pepper until meat is browned.
Boil cabbage until tender.
Save 2 cups liquid and drain off excess.
Combine 2 cups liquid, oregano, pepper, salt, and tomato paste and simmer on low heat for 4 minutes.
Add meat, onion, and pepper to mixture.
In a 9x13 pan pour half of meat mixture, then add cabbage, Pour remaining meat mixture and then top with shredded mozzarella.
Bake at 400 until cheese is browned, about 30-45 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A lighter twist on lasagna, this cabbage-based dish layers tender ground turkey, sweet peppers, and savoury tomato sauce with melted mozzarella for a wholesome, veggie-packed meal. Earthy cabbage and fresh herbs shine in this autumnal comfort dish.

title: Pizza Spaghetti
directions: Cook spaghetti and drain.
Mix in 9 x 13-inch greased pan with egg, 1 cup cheese, milk and garlic salt.
Pour spaghetti sauce over spaghetti.
Add 3 cups cheese and arrange pepperoni on top. Bake in oven at 375° for 30 minutes.
Cool 5 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A playful fusion of pizza and pasta, this dish combines al dente spaghetti with creamy cheese, tangy sauce, and pepperoni for a fun, family-friendly twist. Garlicky and cheesy, it’s a crowd-pleaser for any occasion.

title: Italian Ziti Medley
ingredients: 1/2 lb. Italian sausage, sliced into coins
1/3 c. chopped onion (may substitute onion powder, 1 tsp.)
directions: In 4-quart saucepan, brown sausage.
Remove from pan and drain.
Melt butter and cook mushrooms, onion and pepper strips until tender, but not brown.
Blend flour into vegetable mixture. Gradually stir in milk.
Cook, stirring constantly, over medium-low heat until boil.
Boil 1 minute.
Blend in 1 1/2-cup Cheddar, Parmesan and pepper until cheeses are melted and mixture is smooth.
Combine ziti, sausage and vegetable/cheese mixture. Pour into buttered 2-quart casserole.
Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup Cheddar on top.
Bake, covered, at 350° for 30 minutes or bubbly.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, cheesy Italian ziti medley with savoury sausage, mushrooms, and peppers, baked to golden perfection. The velvety cheese sauce and tender pasta make this a rich, satisfying dish for any gathering.

title: Pasta With Chicken, Steak And Shrimp
ingredients: 8 oz. pkg. pasta, of your choice
1 pkg. Mccormick garlic and herb or pasta seasoning
directions: Marinate chicken, steak and shrimp in 1 cup Italian dressing overnight.
Grill steak and chicken; add shrimp last and cook until pink.
(Don't overcook shrimp.)
Cut chicken and steak into small pieces; leave shrimp whole.
Cook pasta according to package directions; drain and rinse.
Prepare seasoning mix according to package directions.
Combine pasta, chicken, steak, shrimp, mushrooms, onions and pasta seasoning; toss to mix.
Place in baking dish and cover with swiss cheese slices.
Bake at 350° for 20 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A protein-packed pasta dish featuring grilled chicken, steak, and shrimp, tossed in a garlicky Italian dressing and Swiss cheese. This vibrant medley is perfect for a quick yet impressive meal.

title: Baked Lasagne
directions: Cook the lasagne and drain.
Brown the meat.
Mix the Ricotta, parsley, nutmeg, cinnamon and eggs.
Alternate in baking dish. Sprinkle some cheese and sauce until dish is filled. Bake at 375° for 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian classic layered with rich bolognese, creamy ricotta, and melted cheese, baked to golden perfection. The warm spices and umami-packed sauce make every bite deeply satisfying.

title: Garden Zucchini Pie
ingredients: 3/4 c. shredded Cheddar or Swiss cheese (3 oz.)
2 tsp. snipped, fresh or 1/2 tsp. dried oregano leaves, crushed
directions: In a large mixing bowl, combine 1 egg, onion and Parmesan cheese.
Stir in potatoes.
Put potato mixture in a 9-inch pie pan or 10-inch quiche dish.
Pat the mixture over the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
Bake, uncovered, in a 400° oven for 35 to 40 minutes or until golden brown.
Cool slightly on a wire rack. Reduce oven temperature to 350°.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Swiss-inspired pie brimming with tender zucchini, creamy cheese, and a hint of garlic. Perfect for a light summer meal or a picnic side dish.

title: Antipasto Pasta Salad
ingredients: 1 (6 oz.) jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained and halved
1/4 lb. Genoa salami, sliced thin and cut 1/4-inch strips
directions: In 4-quart bowl, combine artichoke hearts, salami, olives and Parmesan cheese.
Add olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt and pepper.
Toss well to coat ingredients evenly with dressing.
Add Fontina cheese; toss again.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-American antipasto salad packed with briny olives, salty salami, and tangy cheese, tossed in a zesty lemon-oregano dressing. Ideal for warm-weather gatherings.

title: Crock-Pot Lasagna
ingredients: 1 lb. ground beef, browned and drained
directions: Mix 2 cups Mozzarella (reserve 1 cup for topping), cottage cheese and Parmesan cheese in a bowl; set aside.
Add 1/2 to 3/4 cup spaghetti sauce to meat mixture in bottom of crock-pot.
Add a layer of noodles, broken to fit without overlapping.
Continue layering 1/3 of sauce, 1/3 pepperoni and 1/3 of the cheese mixture.
Repeat with noodles, sauce, pepperoni and cheese mixture until you use it all.
Pour water around edges of crock-pot.
Top with cheese.
Cover and cook on low for 4 to 5 hours or on high for 3 to 4 hours.

_enrichment.description: A slow-cooked twist on lasagna, blending tender ground beef, creamy cheeses, and rich tomato sauce. Effortless and comforting, perfect for feeding a crowd.

title: Quick Pasta Delicious
ingredients: julienne cut zucchini and yellow squash
directions: Heat olive oil in a medium size pan.
Saute zucchini and yellow squash.
Add green pepper, red onion and mushrooms.
Saute until tender and add minced garlic, salt, pepper and frozen peas. Steam for 5 minutes.
Pour in a little bottled marinara sauce and toss with favorite pasta.
Amount of ingredients depends on size of family.

_enrichment.description: A quick and colourful pasta dish bursting with fresh garden vegetables and a touch of marinara. Light yet satisfying, ideal for a busy weeknight dinner.

title: Penne With Tomato Cream Sauce
ingredients: 1 (28 oz.) can Italian plum tomatoes with juice
1 lb. sausage (sweet or hot), casings discarded
directions: Brown sausage meat; put aside.
In a heavy saucepan, combine the tomatoes with juice, cream, garlic and tarragon; bring the liquid to a boil, breaking up the tomatoes.
Add sausage; simmer mixture for 25 to 30 minutes or until sauce is thickened.
Cook penne 12 to 15 minutes in boiling water; drain well.
Toss with tomato sauce.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian classic where al dente penne is tossed in a velvety tomato cream sauce, enriched with garlic, tarragon, and savoury sausage. The dish balances rich creaminess with bright tomato acidity and a hint of herbaceous tarragon.

title: Tailgate Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 375°.
Press crescent rolls out on a jelly roll pan. Bake 10 to 15 minutes. Cool. Combine cream cheese, mayonnaise and dip mix.
Spread over cooled rolls.
Top with finely chopped vegetables, then top with grated cheese. Cut in squares and serve as an appetizer.

_enrichment.description: A quick and fun American tailgate-inspired pizza using crescent rolls as the base, topped with a creamy cheese spread and fresh vegetables. Perfect for casual gatherings or game-day snacks.

title: Eggplant Genovese
directions: Mix the tomato paste with an equal amount of water.
Add herbs, salt and sugar; simmer on low heat to a boil.
Cut the eggplant in one-inch slices, lengthwise.
Pour oil in casserole and alternate layers of eggplant slices with cheese, finishing with the cheese.
Pour the tomato sauce over it and bake in preheated oven at 375° for 35 to 40 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian bake where layers of tender eggplant meet melted mozzarella and a fragrant tomato-herb sauce. The dish is rich, slightly sweet, and herbaceous, with a satisfying melt-in-the-mouth texture.

title: Pizza Sauce To Can
ingredients: 3 Tbsp. pizza seasoning or Italian seasoning
directions: Wash and core tomatoes.
Cut them up and put them through a juicer (should be about 6 quarts of juice).
Put juice in a large heavy kettle and add remaining ingredients.
Cook until thick and volume is reduced to about 1/2 the original measure.
Ladle into hot pint jars, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
Cover with lids and bands and process in a boiling water bath canner for 35 minutes. Makes 6 pints.

_enrichment.description: A robust Italian tomato sauce preserved in jars, perfect for pizza nights or quick meals. The sauce is rich, slightly tangy, and seasoned with garlic and herbs, ideal for canning enthusiasts.

title: Twenty-Four Hour Salad
ingredients: 1 c. onion, thinly sliced (1 medium onion)
1 (8 oz.) can water chestnuts, thinly sliced
directions: In a 10 x 13-inch pan, layer chopped lettuce, onion, celery, peas and chestnuts.
Spread on mayonnaise, covering all ingredients.
Sprinkle salt, pepper and sugar over top of mayonnaise.
Sprinkle Mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses over mayonnaise (Parmesan first).
Cover tightly with Saran Wrap or pan lid and refrigerate 24 hours.
When ready to serve, top with bacon and tomatoes.
Serves twelve.

_enrichment.description: A retro American salad that transforms crisp lettuce, crunchy vegetables, and creamy mayo into a refreshing, no-cook dish. The 24-hour chill allows flavours to meld, topped with crispy bacon and juicy tomatoes.

title: Hot Pizza Dip
ingredients: 1/2 c. finely chopped sweet red pepper
directions: In a bowl, combine cream cheese, Italian seasoning and garlic powder.
Spread on the bottom of a greased 9-inch pie plate. Combine cheeses; sprinkle half over the cream cheese layer.
Top with the pizza sauce and peppers.
Sprinkle with the remaining cheeses.
Bake at 350° for 20 minutes.
Serve warm with tortilla chips or breadsticks.

_enrichment.description: A creamy, cheesy dip inspired by Italian-American cuisine, blending rich mozzarella and cheddar with tangy pizza sauce and fresh peppers. Perfect for sharing with crusty bread or chips.

title: Savory Spaghetti  Sauce
ingredients: 1 Tbsp. minced fresh basil or 1 tsp. dried
2 tsp. minced fresh oregano or 3/4 tsp. dried
directions: In Dutch oven, cook ground beef and onion until meat is browned and onion is tender; drain.
Add next eight ingredients; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
Remove bay leaf.
Yields 4 to 6 servings, about 1 quart.

_enrichment.description: A hearty, aromatic Italian classic with tender ground beef simmered in a rich tomato sauce infused with fresh basil and oregano. A comforting dish that fills the home with irresistible aromas.

title: Easy Deep Dish Pizza
directions: Heat oven to 425°.
Lightly grease a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1-inch jelly roll pan or cookie sheet.
Mix baking mix and water until soft dough forms; beat vigorously 20 strokes.
Gently smooth dough into ball on floured cloth-covered board.
Knead 20 times.
Pat dough in bottom and up sides of pan with floured hands.
Or roll into 13 x 10-inch rectangle and place on cookie sheet; pinch edges of rectangle, forming 3/4-inch rim.

_enrichment.description: A quick and easy American deep-dish pizza with a flaky biscuit-like crust, loaded with savory beef, mushrooms, and melted mozzarella. A crowd-pleasing dish that’s simpler than traditional pizza dough.

title: Homemade Pizza Crust
directions: Sprinkle yeast into the water and stir until dissolved.
Stir in sugar, salt and oil.
Add 2 cups flour and beat until smooth, then gradually stir in the additional 1 1/2 cups flour.
Dough should be as soft as biscuit dough.
Turn out on lightly floured board and knead until smooth and elastic.
Place in greased bowl and brush top with soft shortening.
Cover and let rise in warm place (85°), free from draft, until doubled in bulk.
Punch down and divide in half.
Form each half into a ball and place on greased baking sheet.
Press out with palms of hands into circles about 12-inches in diameter, making edges slightly thick.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian pizza crust with a soft, elastic texture, perfect for homemade pizzas. Lightly sweetened with a hint of yeast, it’s the foundation of countless Italian-inspired creations.

title: Classic Fettuccine Alfredo
ingredients: generous dash of ground white pepper
1 c. freshly grated Parmesan cheese (about 3 oz.)
directions: Prepare and cook dry fettuccine in large pot of boiling salted water, 6 to 8 minutes just until al dente (tender yet firm to taste); remove from heat.
Drain well; return to dry pot.
Place butter and cream in large, heavy skillet over medium-low heat. Cook and stir until butter melts and mixture bubbles.
Cook and stir 2 minutes more.
Stir in salt, pepper and nutmeg.
Remove from heat.
Gradually stir in cheese until thoroughly blended and smooth.
Return briefly to heat to completely blend cheese, if necessary.
(Do not let sauce bubble or cheese will become lumpy and tough.)

_enrichment.description: A luxurious Roman classic featuring silky fettuccine coated in a velvety Parmesan cream sauce, finished with fresh parsley. Rich, indulgent, and effortlessly elegant.

title: Lasagna(World Famous!)
ingredients: 1 large container small curd cottage cheese
directions: Brown hamburger slowly. Add next 5 ingredients.
Simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
Cook the noodles (according to package directions). Combine remaining ingredients together, except Mozzarella cheese.
Place half the noodles in a 13 x 9-inch pan. Spread half cottage cheese filling, half Mozzarella cheese and half meat sauce.
Repeat.
Bake at 375° for 45 minutes.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian classic layered with rich ragù, creamy béchamel, and melted mozzarella. Bursting with umami from slow-cooked tomatoes and herbs, this dish is a symphony of savoury, tangy, and cheesy flavours.

title: Cherry Tomato Treats
directions: Cut a thin slice from the top and bottom of each tomato. Scoop out the insides and reserve for adding to meat mixture. Brown meat and add onion; drain.
Add seasonings and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and cool slightly.
Add bread crumbs and tomato pulp and mix.
Stuff each tomato with the meat mixture. Sprinkle the top of each tomato with grated Parmesan cheese and snipped parsley.

_enrichment.description: Succulent cherry tomatoes stuffed with a savoury beef and herb filling, baked until tender. A delightful Italian-inspired starter with a balance of umami, tangy tomato, and fresh herbs.

title: Manicotti Florentine
ingredients: 2 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
12 large manicotti noodles, cooked and drained
directions: Saute onion and garlic in butter until tender.
Combine sauteed vegetables, spinach, cheeses, eggs, lemon juice, salt and pepper; mix well.
Fill noodles with spinach mixture, place in 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
Cover; bake at 350° for 40 minutes.
Heat sauce; pour over noodles.
Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese, if desired.

_enrichment.description: A lighter twist on manicotti, blending creamy ricotta, spinach, and lemon for a fresh, herbaceous flavour. This Italian dish is rich yet balanced, perfect for a comforting meal.

title: Pasta-Sausage Soup
ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. hot or sweet Italian sausage
1 medium green pepper, cut into strips
1 (28 oz.) can tomatoes, chopped and liquid reserved
2 to 2 1/2 c. uncooked bow tie pasta
directions: Remove casings from the sausages and cut into 1-inch pieces. In a Dutch oven, brown sausage over medium heat.
Remove sausage and drain all but 2 tablespoons of the drippings.
Saute onion, pepper and garlic until tender.
Add sausage and all remaining ingredients.
Simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender, about 15 to 20 minutes.
Yield:
3 quarts.

_enrichment.description: A hearty Italian-American soup brimming with sausage, tomatoes, and pasta in a savoury broth. Packed with umami and herbs, it’s a comforting bowl of warmth for any season.

title: Pasta With Fresh Asparagus
directions: Boil a pot of water for pasta and begin cooking.
Spinach and egg fettuccine is especially good with this dish.
Clean asparagus and slice across stalks in 1/2-inch pieces.
In wok (or large frypan), heat oil and garlic; then add cut-up asparagus.
Stir-fry about 3 minutes.

_enrichment.description: Silky fettuccine tossed with fresh asparagus, garlic, and a creamy Parmesan sauce. A light yet rich Italian dish with a perfect balance of earthy and tangy notes.

title: Orange Roughy Pasta Florentine
ingredients: 2 c. lightly packed, finely chopped spinach
1 lb. orange roughy, cut in bite size pieces
directions: Coat a 2-quart casserole with cooking spray.
Add garlic. Microwave on High 30 seconds; add cornstarch and next 3 ingredients.
Gradually add milk, stirring with a wire whisk until blended.
Microwave on High 3 to 4 1/2 minutes or until slightly blended, stirring every 1 1/2 minutes.
Stir in spinach and fish. Cover with lid; microwave on High 4 minutes or until fish flakes. Let stand one minute.
Stir in cheese and serve over pasta.

_enrichment.description: A creamy Italian-inspired pasta dish featuring delicate orange roughy fish in a rich spinach and Parmesan sauce, served over linguine. The dish balances the mild sweetness of the fish with the earthy notes of basil and the sharpness of aged Parmesan.

title: Rice Lasagna
ingredients: 1 (15 oz.) container low-fat part skim Ricotta or cottage cheese
2 c. (8 oz.) shredded low-fat part skim Mozzarella cheese
directions: Heat oven to 350°.
Spray a 9 x 13-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
In medium skillet, brown beef and onion; drain. Stir in spaghetti sauce; mix well.
In small bowl, combine Ricotta cheese, Mozzarella cheese and egg whites; mix well.
In the prepared pan, spread 1/3 of meat sauce, 1/2 of rice and 1/2 of Ricotta cheese mixture; repeat layers.
Spread remaining sauce on top; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 350° for 30 to 35 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Yields 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A hearty fusion of Italian and American comfort food, this lasagna layers rice, ground beef, and a trio of cheeses in a rich tomato sauce. Perfect for a filling family meal or meal prep.

title: Homemade Lasagna
directions: Brown beef with onions and mushrooms; drain.
Add tomato paste, sauce and tomatoes; bring to a boil.
Add seasoning and sugar. Cook, covered, for 1 hour or until thick.
Boil lasagna noodles 20 minutes in 2 quarts water.

_enrichment.description: A classic Italian lasagna with layers of rich beef ragù, mushrooms, and melted mozzarella, all bound together by a tangy tomato sauce. A true celebration of Italian comfort food.

title: Easy Pizza
directions: Spread biscuits on bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan.
Spread sour cream over biscuits.
Brown hamburger with onion, Italian seasoning to taste, salt and pepper to taste.
Drain and pour over sour cream.
Add tomato sauce and top with Mozzarella cheese. Bake at 350° for 30 minutes.

_enrichment.description: A quick and easy American-style pizza with a biscuit crust, topped with seasoned ground beef, tomato sauce, and melted mozzarella. Simple, satisfying, and perfect for a casual meal.

title: Salami Shell Salad
ingredients: 1 bunch scallions, cut into 1 inch pieces
1/4 lb. thinly sliced light salami, cut into strips
directions: Cook shells, drain.
Rinse with cold water, drain well, put in medium bowl.
Put oil and garlic in container of blender or food processor, process until garlic is pureed.
Add parsley, oregano, basil, salt and pepper.
Process until parsley is finely chopped. Pour dressing over shells and toss to coat.
Add salami, cheese and scallions, toss again.
Refrigerate until serving time.

_enrichment.description: A vibrant Italian-inspired salad with al dente pasta shells, salami, and a fresh herb dressing. The combination of tangy Parmesan and aromatic herbs makes this dish a refreshing summer staple.

title: Pasta And Cauliflower Soup
ingredients: 1/2 lb. linguine or spaghetti, broken into bits
directions: Break the cauliflower into its flowerets, cutting the bigger ones in halves or quarters so that all the pieces are about 1/2-inch in size.
Put the oil in a soup pot along with the garlic, salt, pepper and the cut-up cauliflower.
Stirring gently, cook over medium heat until the vegetable bits are well oiled and flavored.
Add the tomato paste, hot water, the potato slices and 2 teaspoons salt and bring to a boil.
Break the pasta into 1 or 2-inch lengths as you put it in the pot.
Continue boiling until the pasta is well cooked, has absorbed some of the water and the cauliflower, garlic and tomato have lent their flavors to the pasta.
Before serving discard the garlic clove.
Serve with a sprinkling of Parmesan cheese.

_enrichment.description: A delicious recipe for Pasta And Cauliflower Soup.

title: Quick Artichoke Pasta Salad
ingredients: 4 oz. (1 c. dry) macaroni or twisty noodles or shells
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Drain and rinse with cold water (drain again).
In a large bowl, add pasta, artichokes and marinade, mushrooms, tomatoes, olives, parsley, and basil.
Toss gently.
Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours. Before serving, season to taste with salt and pepper.
Serves 6.

_enrichment.description: A delicious recipe for Quick Artichoke Pasta Salad.

title: Italian Zucchini Soup
directions: In a Dutch oven, brown sausage with onion; drain excess fat. Add the celery, green pepper, sugar, salt, basil, oregano, pepper and tomatoes.
Cover and simmer 1/2 hour.
Add zucchini; simmer 1/2 hour or more.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, if desired. Yield: 2 quarts.

_enrichment.description: A delicious recipe for Italian Zucchini Soup.

title: Party Rye Pizzas(Great For Snacks Or A Party!!)
directions: Brown ground beef and sausage until done.
Drain; add seasonings.
Combine with melted Velveeta cheese and spread on party rye bread.
Top with Mozzarella cheese and bake on cookie sheet for 10 minutes at 400°.

_enrichment.description: A delicious recipe for Party Rye Pizzas(Great For Snacks Or A Party!!).

title: Vegetable Manicotti
directions: Microwave shells to desired doneness.
In small bowl combine zucchini, broccoli, mushrooms, Parmesan cheese and green pepper. Mix well and fill each shell with 1/2 cup of mixture.
Place in 2-quart casserole dish.
Pour spaghetti sauce over shells.
Cover with wax paper and microwave on High 4 to 5 minutes, turning dish 1/4 turn halfway through cooking.
Sprinkle with cheese and microwave uncovered on High 1 to 2 minutes until cheese is melted. Makes 2 servings.

_enrichment.description: A delicious recipe for Vegetable Manicotti.

title: Spinach Manicotti
ingredients: 1 (10 oz.) pkg. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
1 1/2 c. (6 oz.) shredded Mozzarella cheese, divided
2 (28 oz.) jars spaghetti sauce with meat
directions: In large bowl combine Ricotta, spinach, 1 cup Mozzarella, 1/4 cup Parmesan, egg, parsley, onion powder, pepper and garlic powder. Combine spaghetti sauce and water.	Spread 1 cup sauce in an ungreased 9 x 13 baking dish and stuff uncooked manicotti with spinach mixture.
Arrange over sauce.
Pour remaining sauce over manicotti and sprinkle with remaining Mozzarella and Parmesan. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Remove from the refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
Bake, uncovered, at 350° for 40 to 50 minutes or until heated through.
Yield:
6 to 8 servings.

_enrichment.description: A comforting Italian classic, Spinach Manicotti blends creamy ricotta and melted cheeses with tender pasta shells, all smothered in a rich tomato sauce. Its hearty yet balanced flavours make it a beloved dish across Italy and beyond.

title: Choplets And Pasta
directions: In a large pot, boil 10 cups of water.
Make sure the water is very hot and boiling.
Add 1 teaspoon oil and 1/2 teaspoon salt to boiling water.
Add noodles, stir and boil about 5 to 6 minutes. Test for doneness by cutting with fork and tasting.
Drain in colander; do not rinse in cold water.
Pour pasta into dish and put in margarine; let melt.
Add Accent and stir to avoid noodles sticking.

_enrichment.description: A hearty American-Middle Eastern fusion dish, Choplets and Pasta combines tender spiral noodles with savoury choplets and crisp bell peppers in a simple yet flavourful sauce. Perfect for a quick, satisfying meal.

title: Breakfast Pizza Casserole
directions: Press crescent rolls into a 13 x 10-inch casserole dish, bringing up sides to hold liquid (like pizza).
Sprinkle sausage over bottom, on top of the crescent roll layer.
Add hash browns and cheese.
Combine eggs, milk, salt and pepper and mix well. Pour over top of all.
Bake at 375° for 25 to 45 minutes, when eggs are set and top is browned.

_enrichment.description: A brunch favourite, Breakfast Pizza Casserole layers flaky crescent rolls with savoury sausage, crispy hash browns, and melted cheese, all baked in a creamy egg custard. A crowd-pleasing dish with bold, comforting flavours.

title: Carbonara Ala Diane
directions: Cook spaghetti, drain and set aside.
Slice onions and mushrooms.
Cut the pound of bacon in half then in half again; set aside.
Saute the onions and mushrooms in margarine, remove and set aside.
In same frying pan cook bacon until almost done (not crisp).
Drain bacon grease.
Add onions and mushrooms to bacon. Add oregano, spaghetti, half and half and stir over medium heat. Add Parmesan cheese.
Mix well.
Cook 1 to 2 minutes and remove. Serve with a salad and garlic bread.

_enrichment.description: A rustic Italian-American twist on Carbonara, this dish features al dente spaghetti tossed with crispy bacon, caramelised onions, and earthy mushrooms in a creamy Parmesan sauce. Rich, smoky, and utterly satisfying.

title: Becky'S Chili Beans
